approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person who is meditative and thoughtful is considered to be wise and intelligent, while a person who is lazy and ignorant is considered to be foolish.
approved.what_it_means: A person who is meditative and thoughtful may be considered to be wise and intelligent, while a person who is lazy and ignorant may struggle with foolish decisions.

approved.original: जिनके हाथकी अंगुलियाँ दीर्घ हों तो वे प्राणी दीर्घजीवी होते हैं व जिनकी अंगुलियाँ वलियाँ वलियों से रहित हों तो वे प्राणी बड़े भागवाले होते हैं व जिनकी अंगुलियाँ पतली हों तो वे प्राणी वुद्धिमान होते हैं और जिनकी अंगुलियाँ चपटी हों तो वे प्राणी परायण होते हैं यानी दासकर्म के करनेहार होते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person with long fingers is considered to be long-lived, while a person with short fingers is considered to be short-lived. A person with thin fingers is considered to be intelligent, while a person with flat fingers is considered to be a servant or a slave.
approved.what_it_means: A person with long fingers may be considered to be long-lived, while a person with short fingers may struggle with a shorter lifespan. A person with thin fingers may be considered to be intelligent, while a person with flat fingers may be a servant or a slave.

approved.original: स्थूलाभिधनरहिता वाहिन्तामिश्रन शासनिर्याण:
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person with a well-developed Abhida mount is considered to be a ruler or a guardian of the earth, while a person with a weak Abhida mount is considered to be poor and helpless.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-developed Abhida mount may be a natural leader or a guardian of the earth, while a person with a weak Abhida mount may struggle with poverty and lack of resources.

approved.original: निन्नन्तु शिरो महतां बहुनिर्मन्थंदं भवति
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the head line is a significant feature in palmistry, indicating the person's mental abilities and focus.
approved.what_it_means: A well-defined head line reveals a person's mental clarity and focus, while a weak or broken line indicates mental instability.

approved.original: जिसका शीरा वड़ा के समान हो तो वह प्राणी ध्यान में पराया रहता है व जिस दो शीरा हों तो वह मारी पापकारी होकर निर्वनी होता है व जिनका शीरा लचा हो वे मारी महत्त होते हैं और जिनका शीरा बहुत ही गहरा हो तो उन मायियों को श्र नर्धायक होता है =४
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the head line is thick like a vada, the person remains distracted. If there are two head lines, the person is a sinner and will be ruined. If the head line is loose, the person will be great, and if it is very deep, the person will be a great yogi.
approved.what_it_means: A thick head line indicates a person who is easily distracted, while two head lines suggest a person with a troubled past. A loose head line reveals a person's greatness, and a deep head line indicates a great yogi.

approved.original: एकैकभवैः स्निग्धैः कृष्णीरकुष्ठितैरभिन्नप्रैः
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the length of the fingers is an important aspect in palmistry, indicating the person's physical and mental abilities.
approved.what_it_means: A person with long fingers is physically and mentally strong, while short fingers indicate weakness and fragility.

approved.original: सुदुर्भिर्न चातिवहुभिः केशैः सुखभाक् नरेन्द्रो वा
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the hair line is a significant feature in palmistry, indicating the person's mental and physical well-being.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-defined hair line is physically and mentally strong, while a weak or broken hair line indicates poor health and mental instability.

approved.original: जिनके मस्तक के एक एक रोमकूप में एक एक वाल हों यदि वे वाल चिकने काने व टेडे हों व जिनका अंग्राग पिन्न न हो व कमल होकर बहुतसे न हों तो वह मारी सुखभागी या राजा होता है =५
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If there is one line in each mount of the head, if the lines are smooth, fine, and straight, and if the mount of the head is not prominent and has no many lines, then that person is a happy king.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-defined mount of Jupiter is a happy and successful king, while a weak or broken mount indicates a lack of success and happiness.

approved.original: वहपूलविषमकपिलाः स्थूलस्कुटितापरुषस्वाश्च
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the mount of the moon is a significant feature in palmistry, indicating the person's emotional and intuitive abilities.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-defined mount of the moon is emotionally and intuitively strong, while a weak or broken mount indicates emotional instability and poor intuition.

approved.original: अतिकुटिलारचातिघनारच पूर्वजा वित्तदीनानाम्
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the mount of the sun is a significant feature in palmistry, indicating the person's creativity and self-expression.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-defined mount of the sun is creative and self-expressive, while a weak or broken mount indicates a lack of creativity and self-expression.

approved.original: जिनके मस्तक के एक एक रोमकूप में बहुतसे वाल हों यदि वे समान न हों पीले हों व घप्राम में मोटे होकर दूरे हों व कर्कश, छोटे व बहुतसे टेेे होकर अरणे हों तो वे मारी निर्धनी होते हैं =६
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If there are many lines in each mount of the head, if they are not the same, yellow, and thick, and if they are coarse, short, and many, then those people are poor.
approved.what_it_means: A person with many lines in the mount of Jupiter is poor and struggling financially, while a well-defined mount indicates financial stability and success.

approved.original: गात्रुक्षतालज्ञापनाह्—  यद्यद्रुक्षं मांसविद्धीनं शिरापनन्दं च
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that a line on the hand that is dry and thin is inauspicious, while a smooth and fleshy one is auspicious.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a dry and thin line may face challenges, but one with a smooth and fleshy line will have a smooth journey in life.

approved.original: तत्तदनिष्टं प्रोक्तं विपरीतमतः शुभं सर्वम्
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the opposite of a line is auspicious.
approved.what_it_means: The opposite of a challenging line can bring good fortune and prosperity.

approved.original: देह में जो गात्र सखा व मांसहीन होकर नर्मा से ग्यास हो वह अनिष्ट का गाया है इससे विपरीत स्निग्ध, मांसविशिष्ट व अन्यक शिराविशिष्ट हो तो वह स शुभदायक होता है =७
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A line that is thin and dry is inauspicious, but its opposite, a smooth and fleshy line, is auspicious.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a smooth and fleshy line will have a smooth journey in life, while one with a thin and dry line may face challenges.

approved.original: गात्रगंभीरादिलससयमाह्—  त्रिपुलो गम्भीरस्वेव पडुन्तरचतुर्हसः
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that a deep and thick line is a sign of strength.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a deep and thick line is strong and resilient, with the ability to overcome challenges.

approved.original: द्वाया: कमेए कुजलाग्न्यनिलाम्बरोत्था: केचिद्दन्ति दश ताश्च यथानुब्धवा:
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that there are five types of Dwai, which are associated with different elements and deities.
approved.what_it_means: A person's Dwai can reveal their elemental nature and the deities they are associated with, providing insight into their personality and destiny.

approved.original: सूर्याञ्जनाभपुष्टयमोडुपानां तुल्यास्तु लक्षाफलेरिति तत्समाना:
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Dwai associated with the Sun, Vishnu, Indra, Yama, and the Moon are similar to the elements of the universe.
approved.what_it_means: A person's Dwai can reveal their connection to the elements and the universe, providing insight into their cosmic nature.

approved.original: एष्वी, जल, अग्नि, वायु, आकाश इन तच्चां से उपजी हुई कम से पांच द्वाया है उन कितेक आचार्यों ने यथानुपूर्वी दरा कहा है सूर्य, विष्णु, इन्द्र, यमराज और चन्द्रमा ये पूर्वोक्त कायात्रों के प देवता है उन्हीं के तुल्य द्वाया है लक्ष्य व फलां से पाणी उन्हींके समान होते हैं यानी जिस पाणी में जिस तुल्य द्वाया है लक्ष्य व फलां से पाणियों को लक्ष्य व फल वतलाना चाहिये
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: There are five types of Dwai, which are associated with the elements of the universe. The deities associated with these elements are the Sun, Vishnu, Indra, Yama, and the Moon. The water associated with these elements should be used for rituals and ceremonies.
approved.what_it_means: A person's Dwai can reveal their connection to the elements and the universe, and the deities associated with these elements can provide insight into their cosmic nature and destiny.

approved.original: स्वरलक्षणयमाह्-करिष्यौचरीरिष्टदस्तिहाब्दनि:स्वना:
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the sound of a person's voice can reveal their character and destiny.
approved.what_it_means: A person's voice can reveal their inner nature and the path they will take in life.

approved.original: जिसका शब्द हायी, बैल, मथसगृह, मेरी, मुदंग, सिह और मेघ के समान हो ते वह प्रायी राजा होता है और जिसका शब्द ( कष्ठवनि ) गदहे के समान व जजीर होकर ख्वा हो वो वह प्रायी धन व सुखों से रहित होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mount of Saturn is shaped like a horse, it indicates a person who is likely to be a king. If it resembles a donkey, it suggests a person who is often poor and unhappy.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-shaped Mount of Saturn is likely to be a leader, but one with a poorly shaped Mount of Saturn may struggle with poverty and unhappiness.

approved.original: सससारलक्षणयमाह्-सप्त भवन्ति च सारा मेदो मजात्वगस्थुकाऐ
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: There are seven mountains, which are the entire flesh of the body.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates that the person's body is strong and healthy, with seven key areas of vitality.

approved.original: रुधिरं मांसं चेति प्राणभृतां तत्समानफलम्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Blood, flesh, and breath are the same for all living beings.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests that all living beings share a common life force, regardless of their physical differences.

approved.original: वेदा, मजा, त्वचा, श्रस्य, शुक्र, रुधिर और मांस ये सात माखियों के शरीर सारपदार्थ हैं उन्हींके समान फल को कहै
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Veda, Maja, skin, hair, semen, blood, and flesh are the seven mountains of the body, and they have the same effects.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates that the seven key areas of the body have similar effects on a person's life and well-being.

approved.original: रुक्रसारलक्षणयमाह्-तालोछदन्तपाली जिहा नेत्रान्तपायुकुरवराए:
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Mount of Moon is shaped like a crescent moon, and it is located at the end of the finger.
approved.what_it_means: A well-shaped Mount of Moon indicates a person who is sensitive, emotional, and intuitive.

approved.original: रक्तस्तु रक्तसारा बहुसुखवनितार्थपुन्युक्ता:
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Blood is blood, and it is full of happiness, beauty, and good fortune.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests that a person's blood is a source of happiness, beauty, and good fortune in their life.

approved.original: जिनके तालु, ग्रोठ, दाँत, कर्णरन्ध, जिहा, नेत्रान्त, गुदा, हाथ और पैर ये लाख्यां महाभूतकृतां च सर्वभिष्यख्यन्ति स्वदशामवाप्य
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The fingers, thumb, teeth, ear, nose, eyes, anus, hands, and feet are the limbs of the body, and they indicate the person's entire life.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates that a person's fingers, hands, and other body parts reveal their entire life story and destiny.

approved.original: गुर्वांश्च नासास्यरकृत्वकृष्णवपानुमेयनिति ( गृहजातके )
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The nose is created from the flesh of the face, and it is a sign of the person's fate.
approved.what_it_means: A person's nose shape and size can reveal their fate and destiny, including their life challenges and opportunities.

approved.original: गन्धो रसस्तथा रूपं स्पर्शः शुद्धश्च पञ्चम इति वेदान्तिनां मते पुथिन्यागन्ध
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Pancham is considered pure and represents the five elements: earth, water, fire, air, and ether. It is associated with the sense of smell.
approved.what_it_means: The Pancham reveals a person's connection to the five elements and their sense of smell, indicating their ability to perceive and appreciate the world around them.

approved.original: ज्वलस्यरस, अग्ने: रूपम, वायः: स्पर्शः, आकाशस्य रुच्दस्तत्माचा इति
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Jwalas represents the fire element, and its touch is associated with the air element. It is said to be the nature of the sky.
approved.what_it_means: The Jwalas reveals a person's fiery nature and their ability to adapt to changing situations, indicating their potential for creativity and passion.

approved.original: नृतिमान् वर्णः स्निग्धः क्षितिपानां मध्यमः सुतार्थवताय्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Nriti represents a smooth and pleasant complexion, and a medium tone is associated with a person who is good-natured and has a good purpose.
approved.what_it_means: The Nriti reveals a person's pleasant and approachable nature, indicating their ability to connect with others and achieve their goals.

approved.original: जिनका वर्ण तेजस्वी होकर चिकना हो तो वे प्रायी पृथ्वीपाल होते हैं व जिना वर्ण मध्यम हो तो वे प्रायी पुत्रवान् होकर धनवान् होते हैं व जिनका वर्ण रुबा हो वे प्रायी निर्वनी होते हैं व जिनका वर्ण शुद्द हो तो उन प्रायियों को शुभदायक होते हैं और जिनका वर्ण भित्रित हो तो वे प्रायी बड़े दीन होते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Those with a bright and smooth complexion are likely to be rulers, those with a medium complexion are likely to be wealthy and have children, those with a red complexion are likely to be poor, those with a pure complexion are auspicious, and those with a dark complexion are likely to be sad.
approved.what_it_means: The Varna reveals a person's potential for wealth, family, and social status, indicating their opportunities and challenges in life.

approved.original: मुलस्नभावलक्षणमाह—  साध्यमनूकं वक्रोद्वेषशाईलसिंहगरुडसुलाः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The face is said to be the sign of the person’s nature, and those with a face like a monkey, a bull, a boar, a lion, and an eagle are said to be good-natured and have a good purpose.
approved.what_it_means: The Mukha Lakshan reveals a person's natural tendencies and behavior, indicating their potential for success and happiness.

approved.original: मुख से स्वभाव को साधना चाहिये इसलिये जिनका मुख गाँ, बैल, वाप, सिंह और गरुड के समान हो तो वे प्रायी राजा होते हैं जिनका मताप सब करीं वना रहता है और युद्ध में वैरियों को पराजित करते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: One should study the person’s nature from their face, and those with a face like a monkey, a bull, a boar, a lion, and an eagle are likely to be kings who can conquer all and defeat their enemies in war.
approved.what_it_means: The Mukha reveals a person's natural leadership abilities and potential for success in battle, indicating their courage and determination.

approved.original: वानरादिपुषलक्षणमाह—  वानरमहिषवराहाजतुल्यवदनाः सुतार्थसुखभाजः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The face of a monkey, a buffalo, a boar, and an elephant is said to be a sign of a person who is good-natured and has a good purpose.
approved.what_it_means: The Push Lakshan reveals a person's natural kindness and generosity, indicating their potential for happiness and success.

approved.original: जिनके मुख वानर, भैंसा, शूकर और वकरे के समान हों तो वे प्रायी पुत्रवान् होकर सुखभागी होते हैं व जिनके मुख श्रीर गद्दे व कंट के समान हो तो वे प्रायी दरिद्री होकर दुखी बने रहते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Those with a face like a monkey, a buffalo, a boar, and an elephant are likely to be happy and have children, and those with a face like a deer, a tortoise, and a frog are likely to be poor and unhappy.
approved.what_it_means: The Mukha reveals a person's potential for happiness, family, and wealth, indicating their opportunities and challenges in life.

approved.original: शरीरंगुलमवलक्षणमाह—  श्रेष्ठतं पख्वतिः परिमायं चतुरशीतिरिति पुंसाम्
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that a person with a good body and 24 inches height is usually a middle-class person.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a good body and average height is likely to be stable and balanced in life.

approved.original: जिनका शरीर श्रेष्ठ होते हैं व जिनका शरीर छ: ब्रानवे अंगुल ऊंचा हो तो वे प्रायी मध्य होते हैं व जिनका शरीर चौरासी =४ अंगुल ऊंचा हो तो वे प्रायी भ्रामी होते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a person's body is good and their height is 6 inches, they are usually middle-class. If their height is 84 inches, they are usually wandering.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a good body and average height is likely to be stable and balanced in life, while a person with a good body and tall height is likely to be wandering and restless.

approved.original: भाराधेनुः सुखभाक् तुलितोऽतो हु:सम्भाववत्यूनः
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that a person with a well-developed Mount of Venus is likely to be happy and have a good relationship.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-developed Mount of Venus is likely to have a happy and fulfilling relationship.

approved.original: यदि खियों का मध्यमा त्रिवलीयुक होकर रोमां से रहित हो व दोनों स्तन बने व अविपम होकर कटिन हों व वृस्स्थल कोपल होकर रोमां से विद्धिन हो और ग्रीवा ( घृंच ) शङ्क के समान हो तो वद्ध नारी धनवती होकर सुकां को धारती है ||६||
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the eyebrows are in the middle and free from hair, and the breasts are well-developed and firm, and the navel is deep and the chest is well-developed, then a woman is wealthy and happy.
approved.what_it_means: A woman with well-developed breasts and a firm navel is likely to be wealthy and happy.

approved.original: वन्धुजीवकुसुमोपमोधरो मांसलो रुचिरविम्बिरूपमृत्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A face like a jasmine flower, soft and beautiful.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a face like a jasmine flower is likely to be soft and beautiful, with a gentle and charming personality.

approved.original: कुन्दकुडुमलनिभाः समाद्रिजा योषितां पतिसुसामितार्थदाः ||७||
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Women with a face like a tender cucumber flower are loved by their husbands and are happy.
approved.what_it_means: A woman with a face like a tender cucumber flower is likely to be loved by her husband and have a happy relationship.

approved.original: द्वीयांचिचादिलक्षणमाह— दक्षिणयुक्त्मराठ परपुष्टंसवल्युप्रभितमदीनमनत्यसौष्यम्
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that a person with a well-developed and firm face is likely to be strong and healthy.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-developed and firm face is likely to be strong and healthy.

approved.original: नासासमा समपुटारचिरा प्रशस्ता हम्नीलनीरजदलयुतिहारिणी च ||=||
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A nose that is well-proportioned and has a gentle curve, and is surrounded by blue and green like a lotus flower.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-proportioned and gentle nose is likely to be happy and have a good life.

approved.original: अर्धेन्दुसंस्थानमरोमरां च शस्तं ललाटं न नतं न तुङ्गू ||=||
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A forehead that is well-developed and free from hair, and is neither too curved nor too straight.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-developed and smooth forehead is likely to be happy and have a good life.

approved.original: कर्णयुग्ममपि युक्तमांसलं रास्यते मृदुसमं समाहितम्
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that a person with well-developed and soft ears is likely to be gentle and calm.
approved.what_it_means: A person with well-developed and soft ears is likely to be gentle and calm.

approved.original: खुमुखी सुभगा कन्या तां कण्यां प्रपेक्षः ||=
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A beautiful and charming girl is sought after by many.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a beautiful and charming face is likely to be sought after by many and have a happy and fulfilling life.

approved.original: जिसका अंगूठा सीधा, गोल व गोल नवांवाला होकर कोमलसा पतीत हो तो ही को शुभदायक होता है व जिसकी अंगुलियां सुन्दर पोरांवाली लम्बी व गोल कर क्रपसे पतली प्रतीत हो तो शुभदायक होती हैं और जिसकी अंगुलियां चपटी व गहरी होकर रुखी पतीत हो व जिनकी पीठ रोमां से संगुक हो तो शुभदायक होती हैं और जिनकी अंगुलियां वहुत कोटी, पतली व टेढी होकर विरली प्रतीत हो रोगदायक होती हैं और जिनकी अंगुलियां चौड़े पवां (पोरों) से संगुक हों तो उन को दुःखदायक होती हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Fingernails that are straight, round, and soft are auspicious. Long, curved, and thin nails are also auspicious. Flat, deep, and rough nails, or those with sparse and crooked growth, are inauspicious. Nails with thick, coarse, and prominent ridges are also inauspicious.
approved.what_it_means: The shape and condition of your fingernails reveal your overall health and well-being. Soft and curved nails indicate a calm and peaceful life, while rough and brittle nails suggest difficulties and challenges.

approved.original: नखलसयमाः—  अरुआः सारिखास्तुकः करजाः सुदरां शुभाः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Long and curved nails are auspicious. They are a sign of good fortune and prosperity.
approved.what_it_means: The shape and condition of your nails reveal your potential for success and prosperity. Long and curved nails indicate a strong and optimistic personality.

approved.original: निशा विवर्या शुक्त्यामाः पीता दारिद्र्यसूचकाः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The moon line is a sign of wealth and prosperity. If it is pale, it indicates poverty and hardship.
approved.what_it_means: The moon line reveals your financial situation and potential for wealth. A pale moon line suggests financial struggles and difficulties.

approved.original: नखे पु विन्दवः श्वेताः प्रायः स्यु: स्वेरीणी स्रियाः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Women with white spots on their nails are usually fair and beautiful.
approved.what_it_means: The presence of white spots on your nails reveals your beauty and charm. Women with this feature are often considered to be fair and attractive.

approved.original: पुरुषा प्रपि जायन्ते दुःखिनः पुष्पितेनखेः
approved.simple_explanation: Men who have long and curved nails are often unhappy and troubled.
approved.what_it_means: The shape and condition of your thumb reveal your emotional state. Long and curved nails indicate a troubled and unhappy personality.

approved.original: यदि शोभनयनी रमयियां के नख रकर्ण व शिखा समेत होकर उंचे से प्रतीत हो शुभदायक होते हैं और जिनके नव गहरे, विवर्य व सीपी के समान होकर पीते हों तो उन खियों को दारिद्र्य सूचित करते हैं और जिनके नवांम सफेद विन्दु (को प्रतीत हों तो वे खियां प्रायः पुंश्ली (खिनारि ) होती हैं और यदि पुरुषों के में सफेद चिह हों तो वे भी दुःखी होते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the eyebrows are long, curved, and prominent, they are auspicious. If they are pale, deep, and shell-like, they indicate poverty and hardship. If they have white spots, they are usually fair and beautiful, but if a man has white spots, he is often unhappy.
approved.what_it_means: The shape and condition of your eyebrows reveal your potential for success and happiness. Long and curved eyebrows indicate a strong and optimistic personality, while pale and deep eyebrows suggest financial struggles and difficulties.

approved.original: वंशस्थपृष्ठिलसगणमाः—  अन्तर्निमग्नवंशास्थिपृष्ठिः स्यान्मांसला शुभा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A back with a prominent and fleshy spine is auspicious.
approved.what_it_means: The shape and condition of your back reveal your potential for success and happiness. A back with a prominent and fleshy spine indicates a strong and optimistic personality.

approved.original: जिनके पाठका बंश (धांस ) भीर डिप गया हो तथा पीठ मांस से भरी हो तो
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the back muscles are weak and the spine is prominent, it is auspicious.
approved.what_it_means: The shape and condition of your back reveal your potential for success and happiness. A back with weak muscles and a prominent spine indicates a strong and optimistic personality.

approved.original: कपोललक्ष्यमाह—     *   शस्तौ कपोलौ वामाक्ष्या: पीनौ वृत्तौ सप्तुक्रतौ
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The shape of the cheeks is auspicious if they are full, round, and high. If the cheeks are thin, pointed, and without fat, it is inauspicious.
approved.what_it_means: A person with full, round, and high cheeks is likely to be fortunate and prosperous. Conversely, thin, pointed, and fatless cheeks may indicate difficulties and challenges.

approved.original: रोमरौ परवौ निश्रो निर्मांसो परिज्जयेत्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Thin, pointed, and fatless cheeks are inauspicious.
approved.what_it_means: A person with thin, pointed, and fatless cheeks may face difficulties and challenges in life.

approved.original: जिसके गाल मोटे व गोल होकर ऊँचे मवीत हैं तो उस खी के लिये शुभदा     *   होते हैं और जिसके गाल रोमांवाले, कटोर व निचले होकर मांसरहित पर्तित हैं     *   उस खी को त्याग देने
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the cheeks are full, round, and high, it is auspicious. If the cheeks are thin, pointed, and without fat, it is inauspicious.
approved.what_it_means: A person with full, round, and high cheeks is likely to be fortunate and prosperous, while a person with thin, pointed, and fatless cheeks may face difficulties and challenges.

approved.original: शुक्लक्ष्यमाह—     *   समं समांसं मुस्निग्धं स्वामोदं वर्तुलं हुक्षम्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A mouth that is even, with even flesh, smooth, and round is auspicious.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a smooth, even, and round mouth is likely to be fortunate and prosperous.

approved.original: जिनका मुख समान व समांस तथा चिकना व गोल होकर सुगन्धित प्रतीत हो     *   जिसमें पित्तपुत्र की शोभा यासती हो तो वे खियां इस लोक में धन्यबाद देने योग्य हैं     *   हैं यानी ऐसा मुख धन्य खियां का होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the mouth is even, with even flesh, smooth, and round, and if the beauty of the lips is evident, such a person is worthy of praise.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a smooth, even, and round mouth, and beautiful lips, is likely to be fortunate and prosperous.

approved.original: पाटलो वर्तुल: सिन्ग्यो लेखामृपितमध्यसू:
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Round lips, with a beautiful and attractive shape, are auspicious.
approved.what_it_means: A person with round and attractive lips is likely to be fortunate and prosperous.

approved.original: कुरा: प्रलम्व: स्फुटितो रुक्षो दोर्भाग्यमूचक:
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Thick, protruding, and dry lips are inauspicious.
approved.what_it_means: A person with thick, protruding, and dry lips may face difficulties and challenges in life.

approved.original: रयाव: स्थूलोघरोष्ठ: सादैघन्यकलहप्रद:
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A thick, coarse, and rough tongue is inauspicious.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a thick, coarse, and rough tongue may face difficulties and challenges in life.

approved.original: जिनका अथर ( निवला अथर ) रकवर्ण व गोल होकर चिकुना मतीत हो व जिन     *   की चिकुना रेखा प्रपित हो तो वे खियां राजाओं की रानी होती हैं और जिनका अथर     *   प्रतित हो तो वे खियां राजाओं की रानी होती हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Those with a well-developed Mount of Venus and a smooth, rounded line are likely to be queens of kings. Those with a developed Mount of Venus are also queens of kings.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Mount of Venus and a smooth, rounded line reveal a person's royal and luxurious nature, indicating a life of comfort and luxury.

approved.original: किच्चिन्मध्योन्नतो रोमा विपरीतो विरुद्धकृत्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Mount of Jupiter is developed in the middle, opposite and contrary.
approved.what_it_means: A developed Mount of Jupiter in the middle reveals a person's strong will and determination, while its opposite and contrary nature indicates a potential for conflict and opposition.

approved.original: जिस उत्तम गुणवाली ही का उपरता श्रोठ चिकना मतीत हो तो महाभोगदायक होता है और बीच में कुछ होकर रोमरहित हो तो भी वन भोगों का देता है और तो पूर्वोक लखर्यों से विपरीत लक्षणांवाला मतीत हो तो विरुद्धकारी होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Heart Line is smooth and well-developed, it indicates a person who is generous and indulgent. If it is interrupted in the middle, it still indicates a person who is indulgent, but if it is contrary to previous lines, it indicates a person who is opposing and conflicting.
approved.what_it_means: A smooth and well-developed Heart Line reveals a person's generosity and indulgent nature, while its contrary nature indicates a potential for conflict and opposition.

approved.original: दन्तलक्षणपाद—  गोदीरसन्निभाः स्निग्धा दात्रिशरीना शुभाः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The teeth are like Godhara, smooth and well-developed, and are auspicious.
approved.what_it_means: Fingers that are like Godhara, smooth and well-developed, indicate a person's auspicious and favorable nature.

approved.original: पीताः श्यावाश्र दरानाः स्थूला दीर्घा द्विपङ्कयः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The fingers are yellow, narrow, thick, long and double-jointed.
approved.what_it_means: Fingers that are yellow, narrow, thick, long, and double-jointed indicate a person's potential for suffering and misfortune.

approved.original: प्रवस्तादधिकैँदन्तैर्मातरं मक्षयेत्स्फुटम्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: With many teeth, the mother is destroyed and is scattered.
approved.what_it_means: A person with many teeth may experience a loss of maternal love and nurturing in their life.

approved.original: जिनके दांत गोदूघ के समान तथा चिकने होकर वचीस संख्याबाले हों तथा नीचे व पर समान होकर कुलेक उँचेसे प्रतीत हों तो उन बिरगों को शुभदायक होते हैं और निनके दांत पीले व कपिलवर्णाले, मोटे, लम्बे, दो पतिवाले तथा सीपी के ग्राकारवाले होकर बिरले प्रतीत हों तो उन बिरगों के लिये दुःख व दोर्भाग्य को देते हैं और जिसके नीचे तारक अधिक प्रतीत हों तो वह स्री माता को विनाशली है व जिसके दांत वि-कटाकार प्रतीत हों तो वह खी पति से हीन होती है और जिसके दांत विरले प्रतीत हों तो वह खी पुंश्रली ( क्रिनारी ) होती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the teeth are like Godhara, smooth and well-developed, and equal in size, they are auspicious. If the teeth are yellow, brown, thick, long, double-jointed and rare, they indicate suffering and misfortune. If the teeth are destructive, the person is destructive to their mother. If the teeth are irregular, the person is inferior to their husband. If the teeth are rare, the person is a Krittani.
approved.what_it_means: A person's teeth can reveal their potential for suffering, misfortune, and conflict in relationships, as well as their potential for being destructive to their mother or inferior to their husband.

approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Jihva is like a sweet and soft tongue, and is auspicious.

approved.original: जिसका तालु ( तरुवा ) चिकना तथा लालकुमल के सपान होकर कोमलसा मती हो तो उस ली लिये शुमदायक होता है व जिसका तालु सफेद हो तो वह ली वि होजाती है व जिसका तालु पीला मतीत हो तो वह संन्यासिनी होती है व जिस तालु काला प्रतीत हो तो वह ली सन्तानरहित होकर दुखिया रहती है और जिस तालु रुला मतीत हो तो वह ली चने भाई बन्धुओंवाली होकर बड़े परिवारवाली है | ३ | ४ |  करठे स्थूला मुग्र्चा च कमतीक्ष्णा सुलोहिता
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mount of Moon is soft and pale, the person is gentle and compassionate. If it's white, the person is calm and peaceful. If it's yellow, the person is a renunciate. If it's black, the person is childless and unhappy. If it's red, the person has a large family.
approved.what_it_means: The shape and color of the Mount of Moon reveal a person's emotional nature and relationships.

approved.original: च्रप्रलम्बा शुभा घ्रटी स्थूला कृष्णा च दुःखदा || ५ || अलक्षितदिजं किश्चित् किश्चित्कुक्षपोलकम्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A well-developed and straight Mount of Jupiter is associated with good fortune and success. A thick and black Mount of Jupiter suggests unhappiness and misfortune.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Mount of Jupiter reveals a person's ambition and success, while a thick and black Mount suggests unhappiness and misfortune.

approved.original: स्मितं प्रशस्तं सुदर्शनिमीलितलोचनम् || ६ || जिसकी घाटी कए में मोटीली व गोली व कमसे तीकी व लाली होकर
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mount of Mercury is well-developed and has a beautiful shape, the person is intelligent and has good communication skills. If it's small and pale, the person is not very intelligent.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Mount of Mercury reveals a person's intelligence and communication skills.

approved.original: लक्षणानि परीक्ष्यादो हित्वा दुर्लक्षाण्यपि
approved.simple_explanation: In Samudrika Shastra, Lakshana refers to the characteristics or signs on the body that are used to understand a person's nature and destiny. These signs are observed and analyzed to gain insight into a person's life.
approved.what_it_means: Lakshana reveals a person's inherent nature, strengths, and weaknesses, helping us understand their potential and challenges in life.

approved.original: बडे हर्षवाली स्वियां शोभन लक्षणों व शोभन चरितों के द्वारा अत्यायु पति को दीर्घायु  करती हुईं हर्ष का घर बनाती हैं यही महाभारत वनपर्व में भी प्रसिद्ध है कि  सावित्री ने श्रल्पायु सत्यवान को दीवायु बनाया है इसलिये विद्वानों को त्रादि में  लक्षणों की परीक्षा कर व तुरे लक्षणों को त्यागकर सुलसणा जी की व्याहना चाहिये मेने  गृहस्थों ( गृहस्थों ) के सुव के लिये लक्षणों को कहा है जिनके विज्ञानमात्र से  मनुष्य विशेषज्ञता होजाता हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Women with good characteristics and good behavior can make their husbands live a long life by creating a happy home. This is also mentioned in the Mahabharata that Savitri made her husband Satyavan live long by her good behavior.
approved.what_it_means: A woman's good character and behavior can bring happiness and longevity to her husband's life.

approved.original: इति स्कन्दपुराणकारीखंडे स्रीयां लक्षणं समातिमगादिति शम्

approved.what_it_means: Lakshana is a crucial aspect of understanding a person's nature and destiny.

approved.simple_explanation: A person with a Mount of Moon that is high and wide is considered auspicious. This feature is associated with good fortune and prosperity.

approved.original: जिनके ललाट ऊँचे, विशाल, राङ्कार व विपम होकर अर्धचन्द्राकार प्रतीत हों तो वे प्राणी निधिनी होकर धनवान् होते हैं और जिनके ललाट सीपियों के निशानों से विशाल प्रतीत हों तो वे प्राणी श्राचार्य ( ब्रध्यापक ) होते हैं व जिनके ललाट नसों से व्यास हों तो वे प्राणी पापकारी होते हैं और जिनके ललाट में ऊँची नसें प्रतीत हों या स्वस्तिक ( त्रिकोणाकार ) निशान देखे जावें तो वे प्राणी धनेश्वर ( महाधनवान् ) होते हैं

approved.original: चन्द्रमा के स्थान में प्राप्तहुया साफ होकर तारा के समान निशान यदि सोहता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a clear, star-like mark is seen on the Moon Mount, it indicates a person who is gentle and compassionate.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a kind and caring nature, often with a strong connection to emotions and intuition.

approved.original: Palmistry, also known as chiromancy, is an ancient practice that involves analyzing the lines and patterns on a person's hands to gain insight into their personality, character, and destiny.
approved.simple_explanation: Palmistry is an ancient practice that analyzes hand lines and patterns to understand personality, character, and destiny.
approved.what_it_means: This ancient practice helps us understand the intricate web of a person's life, revealing their strengths, weaknesses, and potential.

approved.original: If you're interested in learning more about palmistry or the Devanagari script, I suggest consulting a reliable source or seeking guidance from a qualified expert in the field.
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If you want to learn more about palmistry or the Devanagari script, consult a reliable source or seek guidance from an expert.
approved.what_it_means: Seeking guidance from an expert will help you navigate the complexities of palmistry and unlock its secrets.

approved.original: दो पातियों में टिकीं, बोटी व सीधी बुद्धतसी रेखायें यदि दुधालय में सोहती हो वह प्राणी प्राणियों का घातुक होकर हत्यासूढीं से संपुत होता होता ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If two lines, one on the Mount of Mercury and one on the Mount of the Moon, are seen, the person is prone to harming others and will face punishment.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a tendency to harm others, often due to reckless or impulsive behavior, which may lead to consequences.

approved.original: त्रिभालये चेदिरादं विशालं चिहं त्रिरेलं सरलं विभाति
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The three lines on the Mount of Venus appear large, three lines are seen, and it looks simple.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person with a strong connection to love, relationships, and emotions, often with a gentle and compassionate nature.

approved.original: संस्थापकोयन्तु विना परीक्षां मतस्य नारीकृतहानिमेति
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Without examination, the founder of the Mount of Jupiter is not known to be harmed.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person with a strong sense of leadership, ambition, and a desire for power, often with a confident and courageous nature.

approved.original: सूर्यके स्थान में साफ सुथरा सीधा व तीन रेखात्रांवाला निशान विशाल होकर सोहता हो तो वह मारी विना परीक्षा मतका चलानेवाला होकर रमणगणों से हुई हानि को पाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a clear, straight, and three-lined mark is seen on the Sun Line, the person will be able to overcome challenges without being harmed and will gain from the mistakes of others.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who is resilient, courageous, and able to overcome obstacles, often with a strong sense of self-confidence and a willingness to learn from others.

approved.original: भोगाधशाखा यदि याति मन्दं तथा द्वितीया भिवएं प्रयाति
approved.simple_explanation: If the Fate Line is weak and the second line is deep, it indicates a person who is despised by their parents and faces difficulties.
approved.what_it_means: This reveals a person who has faced rejection and hardship from their family.

approved.original: मातापितृन्यां घृणितोऽरिभितो दीर्घा न चेन्नारिकृता विपति:
approved.simple_explanation: If the Fate Line is not deep and the person is not protected from difficulties, they will face troubles.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who is vulnerable to challenges and struggles.

approved.original: सौभाग्येखा ( फेटलाइन ) की पहिली शावा शनैथर के स्थान में व दसरी रेखा वृहत्सति के घरमें पहुँच जाते तो वह मारी माता विना से वृहित होकर वैरियों से हात और यदि पूर्वांकरेखा कैली हुईं हो तो वह नारी से की विपदा को भोगता ह
approved.simple_explanation: If the Fate Line's first branch reaches Saturn's location and the sixth line reaches the Mount of Virtue, the person will face difficulties without their mother's support and may face problems in relationships.
approved.what_it_means: This reveals a person who faces challenges without maternal support and may struggle in relationships.

approved.original: सौम्यालयान्ते विशदस्वरूपं चिहं त्रिकोएं यदि आति भिन्नम्
approved.simple_explanation: If the Mount of Venus is separate and distinct, it indicates a person with a gentle and beautiful nature.
approved.what_it_means: This reveals a person with a gentle and beautiful nature.

approved.original: सोयं श्रमासकमना मनुष्यो नारी तदीया स्रुतिमेति सूतो
approved.simple_explanation: A person with a weak thumb is lazy and unable to fulfill their duties.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who is lazy and unable to take responsibility.

approved.original: दुगालय के समीप साफ सुथरा विकोए का निशान भिन्न होकर यदि प्रतीत हो वह मारी बड़ा परित्र्मी होता है और उसकी भार्या सन्तान उपनाने के समय पाती है
approved.simple_explanation: If the Mount of Venus is separate and distinct near the Mount of Moon, it indicates a person who is a big miser and their wife suffers during childbirth.
approved.what_it_means: This reveals a person who is a big miser and their wife may suffer during childbirth.

approved.original: पैत्रीसपुत्या जननी विभित्वा भोगा च रेखा समुयेति सूयं
approved.simple_explanation: If the Fate Line is separate and distinct, it indicates a person who is a devoted and virtuous mother.
approved.what_it_means: This reveals a person who is a devoted and virtuous mother.

approved.original: भूपालवन्धो मनुजो महात्मा मायारतः स्यान्ममतासमेतः
approved.simple_explanation: A person with a developed Mount of Jupiter is a great and wise person.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who is wise and of great character.

approved.original: पपयररस सिरा मरा नाराला पाराला नारालारा सारालाला पारालाला नारालारा सारालाला
approved.simple_explanation: If the Pitri Line breaks and meets the Matrika Line and Bhoga Line, it indicates a person who is revered by kings and saints, and is immersed in Maya.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who is highly respected and spiritual, with a strong connection to the divine.

approved.original: का नातानारालापाराला नारालाला नारालारा सारालाला
approved.simple_explanation: If a person has a Ko Aset Line that is straight and has two lines, it indicates a person who is immoral and prone to financial loss.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who is immoral and prone to financial loss.

approved.original: सातानाराला नारालाला नारालारा सारालाला
approved.simple_explanation: The Soma Line is a sign of a person who is a good son, a good king, and a good sacrificer.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person who is a good son, a good king, and a good sacrificer.

approved.original: मरातानाराला पारालाला नारालारा सारालाला
approved.simple_explanation: If the Matrika Line meets the Pitri Line in the head region, it indicates a person who is unhappy and always desires wealth.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who is unhappy and always desires wealth.

approved.original: णारालाराला पारालाला नारालारा सारालाला
approved.simple_explanation: A person with a Dukha Ardita Line is a person who is unhappy and always desires wealth.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person who is unhappy and always desires wealth.

approved.original: पयररस मरातानाराला नारालारा सारालाला
approved.simple_explanation: If the Pitri Line meets the Matrika Line in the head region and there is a third line between them, it indicates a person who is unhappy and always desires wealth.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who is unhappy and always desires wealth.

approved.original: भोगासमीपहि पिथो विभिन्नं गुणानुरूपं यदि लक्षयुग्मम
approved.simple_explanation: This refers to the Mount of Venus, a region on the palm associated with love, relationships, and values.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Mount of Venus indicates a person who values relationships and is passionate about love and romance.

approved.original: दादिद्व्ययुको मनुजो विवन्धुर्धममारौपि बन्धुता वा
approved.simple_explanation: This refers to the Line of Saturn, a line on the palm associated with challenges, obstacles, and difficulties.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a prominent Line of Saturn may face challenges and difficulties in life, but also develops resilience and perseverance.

approved.original: सै भाग्यरेखा के पासही परस्तर कदेहुय गुणा के आकार वाले दो निशान च प्रतीत होते हों तो वह प्राणी भाइयों से रहित या सहायता से हीन होता हुत्रा दी वनारहता है त्रयवा जितनही चिन्ह प्रतीत होते हैं उतनेही भाई होते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If two marks of different shapes are seen near the Line of Destiny, it indicates a person who is either without brothers or lacks support.
approved.what_it_means: A person with this feature may feel isolated or unsupported, but also has a strong sense of self-reliance and determination.

approved.original: सपुत्यितं चेन्मणिवन्नदेशाचिद्धि दिरेखं यदि याति चान्द्रिय
approved.simple_explanation: This refers to the Mount of Moon, a region on the palm associated with emotions, intuition, and creativity.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Mount of Moon indicates a person who is emotionally intelligent, intuitive, and creative.

approved.original: सोयं जनःस्यात्परदास्युको भग्नं यदा चेत्परवन्दिशेति
approved.simple_explanation: This refers to the Line of Fate, a line on the palm associated with a person's life path and destiny.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a prominent Line of Fate may feel a strong sense of purpose and direction in life, but also may feel a sense of being bound by circumstances.

approved.original: मारिवन्य से उठाहुत्रा दो रेखात्रां बाला निशान यदि दुधातय में चलाजावे तो न मारी पराई दास्यता को करता है यानी परकुरुपां का सेवक होता है और यदि पूण निशान कटा हुत्रा प्रतीत हो तो वह मारी परवन्धनको पाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If two lines are seen rising from the Line of Marriage, it indicates a person who does not engage in extramarital relationships, i.e., a servant of others, and if the entire line is cut, it indicates a person who is separated from their spouse.
approved.what_it_means: A person with this feature may be committed to their partner and avoid infidelity, but also may struggle with feelings of separation or disconnection.

approved.original: सोयं नरः स्यात्प्रमदाविलासी ह्यानन्दाराशी महतापुपासी
approved.simple_explanation: This refers to the Personality Line, a line on the palm associated with a person's personality and character.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a prominent Personality Line may be charming, indulgent, and pleasure-seeking, but also may struggle with feelings of emptiness or disconnection.

approved.original: श्रृंगृढेकी मूलमें साफ सुथरा ब्र:खाश्रां वाला निशान यदि देहा होकर सोहता हो वह प्राणी ममदाश्रां में विलास करनेवाला होकर त्रानन्द की राशिवाला होता हुत्रा महात्मालोगों का सेवक वनारहता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a clear and clean Brahma Trikona is seen in the Mount of Jupiter, it indicates a person who is indulgent in pleasures, happy, and a servant of great souls.
approved.what_it_means: A person with this feature may be charismatic, confident, and ambitious, but also may struggle with feelings of entitlement or arrogance.

approved.page: [page 274] 14. अङ्जालयान्ते विशदं गभीरं वनस्वरूपं यदि भाति चिह्व
approved.original: अङ्जालयान्ते विशदं गभीरं वनस्वरूपं यदि भाति चिह्व
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A clear and deep Mount of Jupiter indicates a person with a strong and wise nature. If it's well-marked, it shows a person with good leadership qualities.
approved.what_it_means: A well-marked Mount of Jupiter reveals a person with strong leadership qualities, good judgment, and a wise nature.

approved.page: [page 274] 15. सोयं निमन्नो हि जलप्रवाहे वाधिर्युको विधुरस्वभावः
approved.original: सोयं निमन्नो हि जलप्रवाहे वाधिर्युको विधुरस्वभावः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person with a straight and smooth Head Line is flexible and adaptable in nature.
approved.what_it_means: A straight and smooth Head Line reveals a person with a flexible and adaptable nature, able to navigate life's challenges with ease.

approved.page: [page 274] 16. चन्द्रालय के पासही साफ सुथरा च गहरा निशान हय्यांडे के समान रूपवाला घट्टा बनाने की मुगरी के समान होर यदि सोहता हो तो वह प्राणी बहिरा हुत्रा देखे स्वभाववाला होकर जलमें दूवजाता है
approved.original: चन्द्रालय के पासही साफ सुथरा च गहरा निशान हय्यांडे के समान रूपवाला घट्टा बनाने की मुगरी के समान होर यदि सोहता हो तो वह प्राणी बहिरा हुत्रा देखे स्वभाववाला होकर जलमें दूवजाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A well-marked Mount of Moon indicates a person with a calm and gentle nature, but may be prone to emotional fluctuations.
approved.what_it_means: A well-marked Mount of Moon reveals a person with a calm and gentle nature, but may be emotionally sensitive and prone to mood swings.

approved.original: तिस्सःसुरेखा मैवन्धसंस्थासां विभिन्ना यदि चाद्यरेखा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Heart Line is different from the other lines, it indicates a person with a unique and varied emotional nature.
approved.what_it_means: A unique Heart Line reveals a person with a complex and varied emotional nature, with a tendency to experience intense emotional fluctuations.

approved.page: [page 274] 18. सोयं यशस्वी मनुजो नरालां प्राज्ञः प्रशंसी परमायुषाः
approved.original: सोयं यशस्वी मनुजो नरालां प्राज्ञः प्रशंसी परमायुषाः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person with a well-marked Life Line is successful, wise, and long-lived.
approved.what_it_means: A well-marked Life Line reveals a person with a long and successful life, marked by wisdom and good health.

approved.page: [page 274] 19. ग्रोयन सीनखायं नो मग्निन्य ( कन्जे ) में वनी राशी है उन्दीके बीच पात
approved.original: ग्रोयन सीनखायं नो मग्निन्य ( कन्जे ) में वनी राशी है उन्दीके बीच पात
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A well-marked Mount of Venus indicates a person with a strong and passionate nature.
approved.what_it_means: A well-marked Mount of Venus reveals a person with a strong and passionate nature, with a tendency to be romantic and emotional.

approved.page: [page 277] सोयं मनुष्यो बलवीर्यहीनो दीनो ह्यधीनो ललनाविहीनः
approved.original: सोयं मनुष्यो बलवीर्यहीनो दीनो ह्यधीनो ललनाविहीनः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person with a weak Mount of Mars is weak, timid, and lacking in courage.
approved.what_it_means: A weak Mount of Mars reveals a person who lacks courage and strength, often feeling timid and vulnerable.

approved.page: [page 277] अंशुः की पूल व पैत्रिखा के पास त्रिपुरुषपवाला निशान यदि सोहता हो तो वह प्राणी बल व बीर्य से हीन होकर दीन व अधीन होताहुया विरेपता से रमयीविहीन होता है
approved.original: अंशुः की पूल व पैत्रिखा के पास त्रिपुरुषपवाला निशान यदि सोहता हो तो वह प्राणी बल व बीर्य से हीन होकर दीन व अधीन होताहुया विरेपता से रमयीविहीन होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a well-marked Mount of Saturn is present near the Pool of Mercury and the Mount of Jupiter, it indicates a person who is weak, timid, and lacking in courage and passion.
approved.what_it_means: A well-marked Mount of Saturn near the Pool of Mercury and the Mount of Jupiter reveals a person who is weak, timid, and lacking in courage and passion, often feeling vulnerable and powerless.

approved.original: चन्द्रालयान्ते विशदं गभीरं तारौनुरूपं यदि आति लक्ष्म
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a clear and deep Mount of Moon appears, it indicates a person who is intuitive and perceptive.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's intuition and ability to perceive subtle energies. They may possess psychic abilities or be highly sensitive to their environment.

approved.original: सोयं नरो मजति नीरमध्ये मानापमानेन युतो यविष्ठः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person with a Mount of Jupiter in water is associated with honor and respect, but also with pride and arrogance.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person who values honor and respect, but may struggle with pride and arrogance, leading to conflicts and power struggles.

approved.original: चन्द्रालय के पास साफ सुवरा व गहरा होकर ताराके समान श्राकारवाला निशान यदि सोहता हो तो वह प्राणी जल में हुआजाता है और उसका छोटा भाई मान व श्रपमान से संकु होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a clear and deep Mount of Moon appears near the Mount of Jupiter, it indicates a person who is born in water and their younger brother is associated with honor and respect.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who is connected to their emotions and intuition, and their younger sibling may be associated with honor and respect, possibly indicating a close and supportive relationship.

approved.original: विद्योतते चेन्द्रियच-न्धदेशे गुणानुरूपं यदि लक्ष्मयुग्मम्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mount of Jupiter is illuminated, it indicates a person with good qualities and a lucky Mount of Venus.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person with positive qualities and a fortunate Mount of Venus, suggesting they may have a strong sense of self-worth and a loving nature.

approved.original: सत्येन हीनो मनुजो मलाब्यो मान्योऽधमानं धनतासमेतः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person with a Mount of Venus in the 12th house is considered to be of low status and associated with poverty.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who may struggle with financial stability and may be associated with poverty, but can still maintain their dignity and self-respect.

approved.original: मथिवन्थ ( कज्ञे ) के ऊपरले भागयें गुणके श्राकारवाले दो निशान यदि सोहते हाँ तो वह प्राणी धनाढ्य व मेला होकर अधमज्ञो का माननीय होताहुया सत्यसे हीन होजाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If two Mount of Venus markings appear on the upper part of the Mount of Mercury, it indicates a person who is wealthy and respected, but also lacks truthfulness.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who may be wealthy and respected, but struggles with honesty and integrity, potentially leading to conflicts and power struggles.

approved.original: सर्पातुरूपं मखिन्धसंस्थं वक्तं सुचिहं सुतरं विभाति
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A Mount of Mercury shaped like a snake indicates a person with a sharp and swift mind.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person with a quick and agile mind, capable of adapting to changing situations and making swift decisions.

approved.original: सोयं नरः स्यात्परिएमदर्शी ज्ञानाधिकारी परकार्यकारी
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person with a Mount of Jupiter in the 10th house is a wise and knowledgeable person who performs their duties well.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who is wise, knowledgeable, and responsible, with a strong sense of duty and a desire to perform their tasks with excellence.

approved.original: सर्पके समान आकारवाला, तेदा निशान परिवन्थ (कज्ञे) में टिकाहुया आभि-कता से यदि सोहता हो तो वह प्राणी ज्ञानाधिकारी व परकार्यकारी होकर परिणामदर्शी होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mount of Venus is shaped like a snake, with a dot in the middle, and it's well-marked, the person is knowledgeable, capable, and a good decision-maker.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who is intelligent, capable, and wise, making them a good decision-maker.

approved.original: कनिष्ठिकापर्वग्युगे विभाति कोणार्धरूपं यदि लक्ष्म शुद्धम्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mount of Jupiter is half-shaped, with a dot in the middle, it's considered auspicious.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person who is ambitious, confident, and has a strong sense of purpose.

approved.original: सोयं नरो वक्रतस्वभावो वेश्याप्रसको वनिताविहीनः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person with a curved nature, prone to prostitution, and without a wife.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person with a crooked nature, prone to immorality, and possibly without a stable relationship.

approved.original: जिस जन के नख टेके व लम्बे होकर प्रतीत हों तो वह प्राणी देवेस्वभाववाला व   रयागामी होकर रमणी से भिदीन होता है
approved.simple_explanation: If a person has fingers that are thick and long, they are of a divine nature, a wanderer, and separated from their loved ones.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person with a divine nature, a wanderer, and possibly separated from their loved ones.

approved.original: स्वल्पस्वरूपा मनुजस्य यस्य श्रापीतवर्णश्र पुनर्भवः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person with short fingers has a bad past life.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person who has had a difficult past life and may be experiencing karma.

approved.original: सोयं जनः स्यात्सभिको हि धूतो मिथ्याप्रभाभी ममतासमेतः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person who is completely foolish, deceived, and full of attachment.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who is foolish, deceived, and possibly attached to material things.

approved.original: जिस मनुष्य के छोटे व पीलेसे नख प्रतीत होते हों तो वह प्राणी फडवाज या दगा-   जा, बलबन्दी और भूठा होकर ममतासे सम्पन्न होता है
approved.simple_explanation: If a person has short and pale fingers, they are a coward, weak, and full of attachment.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person who is weak, cowardly, and possibly attached to material things.

approved.original: शुद्धस्वभावो मनुजोजतिधन्यो जैवात्कः स्याद्दिपदाविद्धीनः || यह रेखा साफ़ कटी, फटी न होकर यदि लम्बी भासती हो तो वह मारी शुद्धस्वभाव वाला व महाधनवान् तथा आयुष्यवान् होकर विपदाओं से विद्धिन होता है || रयामायमाना वितता विभाति पैत्री सुरेखा पुरुषस्य यस्य
approved.simple_explanation: If the Paitri Line is clear, unbroken, and long, it indicates a person with a pure nature, good fortune, and a long life, who is resistant to challenges.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a clear Paitri Line is blessed with a noble nature, good fortune, and a long life, making them resilient to life's challenges.

approved.original: मात्सर्ययुक्तो मनुजो मलाक्यो दौर्जन्यशाली कुर्वातासमेतः || जिस पुरुष के हाथ में पैत्री रेखा चौड़ी होकर कालीसी सोहती हो तो वह प्राणी डाहयुक्त न मलाक्य होकर दौर्जन्यशाली होता हुआ दुबला बना रहता है || पैत्री सुरेखा यदि लम्बमाना संरक्षवर्या विशदा विभाति
approved.simple_explanation: If the Paitri Line is thick and dark, it indicates a person who is envious, malicious, and prone to violence, becoming weak and feeble.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a thick and dark Paitri Line is prone to envy, malice, and violence, leading to a weak and feeble state.

approved.original: सोयं जनः कोधगुतो नितान्तं वन्यस्य बुद्धि भजते वलाढ्यः || यदि पैत्रीरेखा लम्बी, साफ़ व लाल वर्णवाली होकर सोहती हो तो वह मारी कोधी व बलवान् होकर वेनेवर की बुद्धि को भजता है || वर्ग्रेस्य रेखा मिलिता जनन्यामन्यासमेता विशदा विभाति
approved.simple_explanation: If the Paitri Line is long, clear, and red, it indicates a person who is extremely angry, powerful, and prone to wild behavior, dominating others with their intellect.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a long, clear, and red Paitri Line is extremely angry, powerful, and prone to wild behavior, dominating others with their intellect.

approved.original: सोयं जनो दुर्वलतामेतो दान्तस्वभावो दैघितारतत्र || यदि पैत्रीरेखा मात्रीरेखा में मिलगई हो और अन्य रेखाओं से संयुक्त होकर साफ़ होती हो तो वह मारी दुवला व दान्तस्वभाववाला होता हुआ दधिता में रहता है || हस्तद्ये चेन्मलुजस्य यस्य मध्ये विवर्णा यदि भाति पैत्री
approved.simple_explanation: If the Paitri Line is merged with the Mother Line and clear, it indicates a person who is weak, timid, and prone to fear, living a life of anxiety.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a merged Paitri Line is weak, timid, and prone to fear, living a life of anxiety.

approved.original: शुद्धस्वभावो मनुजोजतिधन्यो जैवात्कः स्याद्दिपदाविद्धीनः || यह रेखा साफ़ कटी, फटी न होकर यदि लम्बी भासती हो तो वह मारी शुद्धस्वभाव वाला व महाधनवान् तथा आयुष्यवान् होकर विपदाओं से विद्धिन होता है || रयामायमाना वितता विभाति पैत्री सुरेखा पुरुषस्य यस्य
approved.simple_explanation: If the Paitri Line is clear, unbroken, and long, it indicates a person with a pure nature, good fortune, and a long life, who is resistant to challenges.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a clear Paitri Line is blessed with a noble nature, good fortune, and a long life, making them resilient to life's challenges.

approved.original: मात्सर्ययुक्तो मनुजो मलाक्यो दौर्जन्यशाली कुर्वातासमेतः || जिस पुरुष के हाथ में पैत्री रेखा चौड़ी होकर कालीसी सोहती हो तो वह प्राणी डाहयुक्त न मलाक्य होकर दौर्जन्यशाली होता हुआ दुबला बना रहता है || पैत्री सुरेखा यदि लम्बमाना संरक्षवर्या विशदा विभाति
approved.simple_explanation: If the Paitri Line is thick and dark, it indicates a person who is envious, malicious, and prone to violence, becoming weak and feeble.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a thick and dark Paitri Line is prone to envy, malice, and violence, leading to a weak and feeble state.

approved.original: कान्यालयाचलिता सुरेला वकस्वरूपा यदि याति चान्द्रिका
approved.simple_explanation: If the Chandra Line is clear and well-formed, it indicates a person who is gentle, beautiful, and peaceful.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a clear and well-formed Chandra Line is gentle, beautiful, and peaceful, reflecting a calm and serene nature.

approved.original: चोयें प्रतुत्तो मनुजस्तदानीं हत्यापकारदैः सहितो नराएाव्
approved.simple_explanation: If the Chandra Line is weak and fragmented, it indicates a person who is prone to violence, cruelty, and evil deeds, surrounded by negative energies.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a weak and fragmented Chandra Line is prone to violence, cruelty, and evil deeds, surrounded by negative energies.

approved.original: यदि शुकालय से चली हुई वेलास्किन रेवा देदी होकर बुधालय पर्यन्त चली जाने ते वह मारी चोरी करने का श्रादी होता होता है
approved.simple_explanation: If the Marriage Line is short and broken, it indicates a tendency to engage in illicit relationships.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's tendency to engage in illicit relationships, indicating a lack of commitment and loyalty in their relationships.

approved.original: एषा सुरेखा नृजुतासमेता सौम्यालयं याति गर्भीरूपा
approved.simple_explanation: This line is smooth and gentle, indicating a calm and peaceful nature.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's calm and peaceful nature, indicating a gentle and soothing presence in their relationships.

approved.original: सौभाग्यशाली मनुजो मनीषी विस्यातकर्तिर्विदितो धरायाम्
approved.simple_explanation: Favorable individuals are wise, knowledgeable, and well-respected in society.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's potential for wisdom, knowledge, and respect in their community.

approved.original: यद वेलास्किव रेवा सीधी व गहरी होकर बुधालय पर्यन्त चली जावे तो वह मारी सौभाग्यशाली, विद्यान् व विल्यातकीर्विदाला होकर धरामएडल में प्रसिद्ध होता है
approved.simple_explanation: If the Line of Mercury is straight and deep, it indicates a person who is fortunate, knowledgeable, and well-respected in society.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's potential for knowledge, respect, and recognition in their community.

approved.original: रेखा चतन्ती शशिमूलगेहादोलार्धरूपा धिपयं प्रयाति
approved.simple_explanation: The Moon Line is clear and distinct, indicating a person's emotional and intuitive nature.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's emotional and intuitive nature, indicating a strong connection to their emotions and inner world.

approved.original: यदि बुधालय से चली हुई रेखा गोलार्धरूप होकर बृहस्पति के स्थान में चलीनां तो उसे कविलोग 'गर्डल' कहते हैं और अन्याचार्य 'वृत्तार्धरूप' बतलाते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: If the Line of Mercury is in the shape of a semi-circle and reaches the planet Jupiter, it is called the Girdle Line by poets, and the Half-Circle Line by others.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's creative and poetic nature, indicating a strong connection to their imagination and creativity.

approved.original: एषा सुरेखा विशदा सरका विन्ना न भिन्ना यदि आति पापौ
approved.simple_explanation: This clear line is distinct and separate, and if it appears, it indicates the presence of good qualities.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's strong sense of morality and good qualities, indicating a strong connection to their values and principles.

approved.original: याराला नारालास्ता नारालास्ता िास्ता हालास्ता
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Heart Line is clear, straight, and not bent, then that person is a high-ranking official, beautiful, and gets a group of happiness.
approved.what_it_means: A clear Heart Line reveals a person's leadership qualities, beauty, and good fortune. They are likely to be happy and successful.

approved.original: स्त नाराला नारालास्ता नारालास्ता हालास्ता
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If this Mount of Saturn is strong, then that person is a strong leader, self-interested, and gets wealth.
approved.what_it_means: A strong Mount of Saturn reveals a person's leadership qualities, self-interest, and ability to accumulate wealth.

approved.original: मराला नारालास्ता मराला हालास्ता
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If this Mount of Rahu is black, yellow, and full, and not bent, then that person is a great Bengali, a high-ranking official, a thief, and gets dense wealth.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Mount of Rahu reveals a person's ability to accumulate wealth and their potential for success.

approved.original: भालास्त नाराला नारालास्ता भालास्ता सिल
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If this Mount of Sun is moving from the temple, then it becomes half and becomes sweet.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's creativity, optimism, and ability to shine.

approved.original: नाराला नारालास्ता नारालास्ता षिल
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This person is more cunning, a deceiver, a liar, and lustful.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Mount of Mars reveals a person's cunning, deceitful, and lustful nature.

approved.original: भालास्त नाराला नारालास्ता भालास्ता पारा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mount of Mercury is moving from the temple and reaches the Budhalya, then that person is a Bengali, a Bengali, and becomes a failure.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's potential for failure and their inability to achieve their goals.

approved.original: ततश्चतुर्थी दिननाथनाथा शुक्राधिपा पश्चिमिका प्रतिद्धा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Then the fourth house is the lord of Venus, the western one is the one who is sought after.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates that the person's fourth house, associated with relationships and partnerships, is influenced by Venus, suggesting a strong desire for love and connection.

approved.original: उधाधिनाथा खलु पठिका सा या सतमी सा क्षपदाधिपेशा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The lord of the seventh house is indeed the one who is the ruler of the seventh house itself.
approved.what_it_means: This feature suggests that the person's seventh house, associated with marriage and long-term relationships, is influenced by the ruler of the seventh house, indicating a strong connection to their partner.

approved.original: तदनन्तर चौथी रेखा को सूर्यस्वामिनी, पांचवीं को मुगुस्वामिनी, बुधी को उपस्तामिनी और सातवीं को चन्द्रस्वामिनी मेने कहा है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Then the fourth line is the Sun lord, the fifth is the Moon lord, the sixth is the Budhi lord, and the seventh is the Moon lord.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates that the person's life force, associated with the Sun line, is strong and radiant, suggesting a confident and energetic personality.

approved.original: वयःकमस्याब्दनिरूपएं संप्रोच्यते वै नितरामुपायः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The life line is explained in terms of years, and it is indeed a very effective way.
approved.what_it_means: This feature suggests that the person's life line, associated with their life journey, is a powerful indicator of their life path and purpose.

approved.original: एका कुरेखा यदि कर्णयुग्मस्नायुं समेतेह तदा विचार्यस्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If one line is with the earlobe and the neck, then consider it.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates that the person's heart line, associated with their emotions and relationships, is connected to their earlobe and neck, suggesting a strong emotional connection to their loved ones.

approved.original: वयःकमसम्बन्धी वयों के निरूपण में अतिशयिता से यह उपाय कहा जाता है कि एकसुद्रा रेखा जो की नवकि कानों की नस ( रग ) को मास होजाती है उस समय पषितों को विचारना चाहिये
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This is a method to determine age related to Vayakam. It involves a single line that touches the nerve of the ear.
approved.what_it_means: This line indicates a person's age related to their Vayakam, which is a vital energy in the body. It reveals their life force and vitality.

approved.original: एवा कुरेखा यदि वामकर्पस्नायोः समुत्था समुपैति सीमाम्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Kurukh line rises from the left side of the spine and meets the limit.
approved.what_it_means: This line indicates a person's potential for spiritual growth and self-realization. It reveals their ability to transcend the material world.

approved.original: आलस्य वामां निगदेशाब्दं वयःकमं वा रविवर्षसम्भितम्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Indolence is the left side of the palm, age related to Vayakam or the sun year.
approved.what_it_means: This line indicates a person's tendency towards laziness and procrastination. It reveals their lack of motivation and energy.

approved.original: यदि यह कुद्रेखा वार्ये कानकी रग से उटी हुई भालकी वाम सीमा को भाम होती है तो दशवर्ष या वारवर्ष का वयःकम कहना चाहिये
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If this Kudraka line is connected to the ear nerve and touches the left side of the head, then it is said to be ten or twelve years old.
approved.what_it_means: This line indicates a person's age and vitality. It reveals their energy and life force, which is connected to their ear and head.

approved.original: आस्पत्ररूपा परित्रयमाना होथा कुरेखा यदि आलमध्यम्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Aaspatra shaped line is in the middle of the palm.
approved.what_it_means: This line indicates a person's potential for spiritual growth and self-realization. It reveals their ability to transcend the material world.

approved.original: संभेदयित्वा खलु विस्तृता चेदेकोनत्रिराच्छरदं वदन्ति
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If it is expanded, then it is said to be a triangle of one and a half.
approved.what_it_means: This line indicates a person's potential for growth and expansion. It reveals their ability to adapt and evolve.

approved.original: यदि कुद्रेख स्याधरूप होकर परित्रयमान होती हुई यह चुद्रारेखा कपाल का मधभाग भेदनकर फैलजावे तो उनतीस वर्ष का वयःकम कहते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Kudraka line is in the shape of a triangle and this small line breaks the middle of the head and spreads, then it is said to be thirty-three years old.
approved.what_it_means: This line indicates a person's age and vitality. It reveals their energy and life force, which is connected to their head and brain.

approved.original: एवा कुरेखा यदि हस्वरूपा वयःकमं इस्न्तरं वदन्ति
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If this Kurukh line is in the shape of a human, then it is said to be age related to Vayakam.
approved.what_it_means: This line indicates a person's potential for spiritual growth and self-realization. It reveals their ability to transcend the material world.

approved.original: दीर्घा यदानी खलु दीर्घरूपं न्यूनाधिकं वै स्वधिया विचार्यस्
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the shape of the Mount of Mercury can be either long or short, and one should consider its length or shortness while interpreting.
approved.what_it_means: The shape of the Mount of Mercury reveals the person's mental agility and ability to learn new things. A long shape indicates a quick learner, while a short shape suggests a slower learner.

approved.original: यदि यह चुद्रारेखा हस्वरूप से प्रतीत होवे तो ग्रलवयःकम और यदि दीर्घरूप से प्रतीत होवे तो वडा वयःकम कहते हैं इस प्रकार विद्रानों को अपनी बुद्धि से न्यूनता या अधिकता का विचार करना चाहिये
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the shape of the Head Line can indicate either a short or long lifespan, and one should consider its length or shortness while interpreting.
approved.what_it_means: The shape of the Head Line reveals the person's lifespan and mental abilities. A short shape indicates a shorter lifespan, while a long shape suggests a longer lifespan.

approved.original: ग्रथ चतुर्दशजन्मसमयनिर्णयमाह—  यस्यास्ति चतुर्थी कालवर्ण रात्रो दियामं जनने जनस्य
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the Life Line can indicate the person's lifespan, and one should consider the fourth phase of the Life Line while interpreting.
approved.what_it_means: The Life Line reveals the person's lifespan and overall health. A well-developed Life Line indicates good health, while a weak Life Line suggests poor health.

approved.original: आरयामवर्लं तदपेक्षा चेदघर्थीमितं वै समयं समीयात्
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the Life Line can indicate the person's lifespan, and one should consider its length or shortness while interpreting.
approved.what_it_means: The Life Line reveals the person's lifespan and overall health. A long Life Line indicates a longer lifespan, while a short Life Line suggests a shorter lifespan.

approved.original: जिस प्राकी का नेत्र कालावर्ण प्रतीत होता हो तो उसका जन्मसमय रात्रिके दोहर का कहना चाहिये और जो सकी अपेक्षा कुद्रेक कालावर्ण प्रतीत होता हो तो एकपकी का जन्म समय जानना चाहिये
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the shape of the Mount of Jupiter can indicate the person's birth time, and one should consider its shape while interpreting.
approved.what_it_means: The shape of the Mount of Jupiter reveals the person's birth time and overall destiny. A well-developed Mount of Jupiter indicates a good destiny, while a weak Mount of Jupiter suggests a poor destiny.

approved.original: जिसकी दाहिनी भुजा के बीच में साफ सुवरा निशान प्रतीयमान होता ही तो मिथुन तानगत वीस श्रंश से लेकर पश्चिस श्रंश के भीतर उस प्राणी का जन्म बताना चाहिए
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that a clear mark on the Mount of Venus can indicate the person's birth sign, and one should consider its location while interpreting.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Venus reveals the person's birth sign and emotional nature. A well-developed Mount of Venus indicates a sensitive and emotional person, while a weak Mount of Venus suggests a less sensitive and emotional person.

approved.original: विद्योतते चेतखलु वामवाहोर्भये सुचिहं विशदं च यस्य
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the Mount of the Moon can indicate the person's emotional nature, and one should consider its shape while interpreting.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of the Moon reveals the person's emotional nature and intuition. A well-developed Mount of the Moon indicates a sensitive and intuitive person, while a weak Mount of the Moon suggests a less sensitive and intuitive person.

approved.original: श्रारम्य विशरं तदानी त्रिशारामध्ये मिथुनस्य जन्म

approved.original: दोहा हो और यदि शनि रेखा को छता न हो तो दाहिनी श्रोर वक्षस्थल में टिके छुए तिलको कहना चाहिये

approved.original: गुरोग्रेश्र निम्रे खलु दक्षभागे गुग्माइपारवे तिलकादिक स्यात्
