approved.original: जिसकी कपनन्ली के ऊपरले भाग में यदि तिलादि का चिह सोहता हो तो गुदा के वध्य में या तांदी के ऊपर अपर तिलादि का चिह कविलोग कहते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: A mark on the upper arm indicates a person's strength and courage. This suggests a person who is brave and confident.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's inner strength and courage, indicating they are brave and confident.

approved.page: [page 375] 16. गलस्य नल्याः खलु दक्षपाँरवे चिहं तिलाद्यं विशदं विभाति
approved.original: गलस्य नल्याः खलु दक्षपाँरवे चिहं तिलाद्यं विशदं विभाति
approved.simple_explanation: A mark on the right side of the throat indicates a person's good communication skills. This suggests a person who is articulate and expressive.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's effective communication skills, indicating they are articulate and expressive.

approved.page: [page 375] 17. वेदेतदानीं मनुजस्य तस्य ऊरोश्र दक्षे भयितं तिलाद्यं
approved.original: वेदेतदानीं मनुजस्य तस्य ऊरोश्र दक्षे भयितं तिलाद्यं
approved.simple_explanation: A mark on the right hip indicates a person's good health and vitality. This suggests a person who is energetic and active.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's good physical health and vitality, indicating they are energetic and active.

approved.page: [page 375] 18. यदि गले की नली के दाहिने तरफ बिराद तिलादि का चिह सोहता हो तो उस पाणी की ऊरू के दाहिने भाग में तिलादि का चिह पाहितां ने कहा है
approved.original: यदि गले की नली के दाहिने तरफ बिराद तिलादि का चिह सोहता हो तो उस पाणी की ऊरू के दाहिने भाग में तिलादि का चिह पाहितां ने कहा है
approved.simple_explanation: A mark on the right side of the throat indicates a person's good health and vitality. This suggests a person who is energetic and active.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's good physical health and vitality, indicating they are energetic and active.

approved.original: खलु वामपार्वें प्रतीयते चेदिरादं तिलाघम्
approved.simple_explanation: A mark on the left side indicates a person's emotional and intuitive nature. This suggests a person who is sensitive and empathetic.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's emotional and intuitive nature, indicating they are sensitive and empathetic.

approved.original: द्रूयात्सुचिहं पुरुषस्य तस्य ऊराश्च सन्धे: किल संव्यदेशो
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the Mount of Moon is a sign of a person's emotional and intuitive nature.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Mount of Moon reveals a person's emotional depth, intuition, and creativity, making them empathetic and imaginative.

approved.original: यदि कएटनली के वामभाग में उज्ज्वतरूप तिलादि का चिह प्रतीयमान होता होता हो तो उस प्रायी की कुरु सण्धि के वार्यें तरफ तिलादि का चिह कहना चाहिये
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that a mark on the Mount of Jupiter's left side indicates a person's ambitions and desires.
approved.what_it_means: A mark on the Mount of Jupiter's left side reveals a person's strong ambitions and desires, driving them to achieve success and recognition.

approved.original: भालाङ्कविज्ञानमिदं मयाक्कं नारीनरायां शुभदं शिवेरो
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the Forehead Line is a sign of a person's mental clarity and focus.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Forehead Line reveals a person's mental clarity, focus, and determination, making them sharp and insightful.

approved.original: भ्रूयासमात्रेएा नरा: सुग्रज्या: भूयासुरुर्य्या सकलप्रियास्ते
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the Life Line is a sign of a person's vitality and energy.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Life Line reveals a person's vitality, energy, and resilience, making them strong and enduring.

approved.original: श्राहो शिवेरे ! यह भालरेवा के चुलसखां का विज्ञान हमने कहा है, जो कि न नारी गर्यों को शुभदायक है कि जिसके श्रष्यासमात्र से मनुष्य लोग महापूजनीय होते हैं और वेही लोग भूपडल में सर्वां के प्यारे होंगे
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the Mount of Venus is a sign of a person's emotional and sensual nature.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Mount of Venus reveals a person's emotional and sensual nature, making them loving, affectionate, and passionate.

approved.original: श्राहो मिये ! भ्रादर समेत पधते हुए मनुष्य को मङ्गलों का मङ्गल होकर ईश नाम परमेश्वर कल्याण को देवे श्रोर वध, पुरुष लोक में धन्यवाद देने वोग्य होवेगा
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the Mount of Mercury is a sign of a person's intellectual and communicative nature.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Mount of Mercury reveals a person's intellectual and communicative nature, making them quick-witted, adaptable, and effective communicators.

approved.original: इति श्रीमद्द्रिनवर शाक्तिरसंकलित सामुद्रिकशास्यो न्तरादं भालरेवासुनक्षण-वर्षननाम मयमोङ्ग: समासिं पफायोति शाम्
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the Mount of Sun is a sign of a person's confidence and leadership.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Mount of Sun reveals a person's confidence, leadership, and charisma, making them natural leaders and visionaries.

approved.original: विध्नव्यूहहं पेशानिरतं भूत्यादिभि: सवितं स्वमाध्यायुतं स्वरोदगतं ज्ञानं बुवे विन्मुदे
approved.simple_explanation: Sushama refers to a person's inherent nature or character. It is the combination of their positive and negative traits that shape their personality.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a strong Sushama is likely to have a balanced and harmonious nature, with a mix of good and bad qualities.

approved.original: सापुद्रिकस्वभाष्याये सुस्वमानाह— नन्द उवाच
approved.simple_explanation: Sushama is a person's inherent nature or character. It is the combination of their positive and negative traits that shape their personality.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a strong Sushama is likely to have a balanced and harmonious nature, with a mix of good and bad qualities.

approved.original: केन स्वमेन किं पुरायं केन पुंसां भवेत्सुखम्
approved.simple_explanation: This sentence asks about the source of happiness and suffering in human life.
approved.what_it_means: A person's Sushama can reveal their potential for happiness and suffering, and how they can achieve a balanced and fulfilling life.

approved.original: नन्दनी बोले कि, हे प्रभो ! किस स्वम से पुरुषों को क्या पुण्य होता है ? और किस से क्या सुख होता है और कौन कौन सुस्वम हैं उन सर्वों को कहिये
approved.simple_explanation: Nandini asks about the source of happiness and suffering in human life, and what makes a person's Sushama good or bad.
approved.what_it_means: A person's Sushama can reveal their potential for happiness and suffering, and how they can achieve a balanced and fulfilling life.

approved.original: श्रीभगवान्जी बोले कि, वेदों में सामवेद श्रेषु में मरास्तः वहां ही कावशासायां पुर्यकारे मनोहरे
approved.simple_explanation: Lord Krishna explains that the Sushama is revealed in the Samaveda, a Vedic text.
approved.what_it_means: A person's Sushama can be understood by studying the Samaveda and other Vedic texts, which reveal the secrets of human nature and destiny.

approved.original: सामुद्रिकशास्त्र सुन्यको यश्र सुस्वमः राश्वत्पुरएयफलप्रदः
approved.simple_explanation: Samudrika Shastra reveals a person's Sushama, which is a source of good fortune and auspicious results.
approved.what_it_means: A person's Sushama is a key to their good fortune and success, and can be understood by studying Samudrika Shastra.

approved.original: साम ना का जा स्र नि हारन्का सि नि लेरासि नि हारन्का
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Seeing joy in dreams and married people or dancers, or hearing a new song, indicates impending trouble.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person prone to trouble and misfortune, often due to their own reckless behavior.

approved.original: साम ना का जा स्र नि हारन्का सि नि लेरासि नि हारन्का
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Seeing joy in dreams and married people or dancers, or hearing a new song, indicates impending trouble.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person prone to trouble and misfortune, often due to their own reckless behavior.

approved.original: पतन्त्यागत्य यदात्रे तस्य मृत्युर्न संशयः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If Mars enters Aries, there is no doubt about death. This teaches that certain planetary positions can be fatal.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person's life force is vulnerable to sudden, intense challenges.

approved.original: रुषा धावन्ति यं स्वमे स रोगी निश्चितं अवेत्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Those who run with anger are certainly sick. This teaches that intense anger can be a sign of underlying health issues.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests the person may struggle with anger management, potentially leading to health problems.

approved.original: इति श्रीवल्लभैर्वें श्रीकृष्णान्मसवसहे दुस्सम्पदर्शनम्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Thus, Shri Vallabha says that the Dus Sampada is the sight of the Lord with the Sun and Mars.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person's ability to see the divine in all aspects of life.

approved.original: यदि कोई प्रार्थी मूलसमेत सुर्यमएडलको सफेद, काला और हन्दीसमान वर्णवाला है वह ब्रः महीना से अधिक नहीं जीता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a supplicant is born with the Sun, Moon, and Ascendant in white, black, and henna-like colors, they do not live beyond a Brahmah Muhurta.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person's life is cut short, possibly due to a lack of spiritual connection.

approved.original: रविभिन्ने जले हटे संपूर्ये न श्रुतिः कचित्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: When the Sun is in water signs, it is not fully heard, it is cut short.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests a person's emotions and intuition may be suppressed or misunderstood.

approved.original: जव जलमें सूर्यका मएडल पूरा देव पड़ता है तो कभी मोत नहीं होती है व दिशात्रों खएड क्रमसे एक मास, दो मास व तीन मास में मोत होती है और यदि धूमसंकुलित स जल में सूर्य के मएडल में मध्यवर्ती ब्रेद देखा जाता है तो दशा दिवस में मोत है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Sun's sign is fully immersed in water, then it does not happen in the first month, but in the second and third months, and if the Sun's sign is seen in the middle of the water, then it happens in ten days.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person's emotional and intuitive abilities may develop over time, potentially leading to spiritual growth.

approved.original: यो न परयति निस्तेजो वर्षान्ते प्रियते धुनम्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The one who does not see the Nischita Yoga is certainly dead at the end of the year.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests a person's failure to recognize their destiny can lead to a premature end.

approved.original: अरुन्धती, धुक, सोम वा ब्राया में निस्तेज महापथ को जो नहीं देखता है वह वर्णन्त निश्चयकर मर जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The one who does not see the Nischita Yoga in Arundhati, Dhuk, Som, or Braja is certainly dead, it is certain.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person's inability to see their life path can lead to a certain and untimely death.

approved.original: सच्चिद्रो दरयते चन्द्रस्तद्द्रा दर्पए रविः
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the Mount of Sun is associated with confidence and ego.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-developed Mount of Sun is confident and has a strong ego, but may also be arrogant.

approved.original: जो प्रायी दर्पए ( शीशा ) में चन्द्रा और सूर्य को बेदसमेत देखता है या निस्पृह देवा जाता है तो वह वर्ष के भीतरही मर जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a person sees both Sun and Moon in their Head Line or becomes indifferent, they will die within a year.
approved.what_it_means: A person with this feature may be prone to early death or spiritual crisis.

approved.original: वर्षान्ते जायते श्रुत्यः कालज्ञानं शिवोदितम्
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the Life Line is associated with spiritual knowledge and enlightenment.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-developed Life Line is spiritually aware and may have a deep understanding of the universe.

approved.original: जिसकी सूर्यनाडी ( इडा ) पूर्ण हो और चन्द्रनाडी ( पिला ) नहीं देख इती हो तो उसकी वर्षान्त में मोत होती है यदि कालज्ञान श्रीवमीने कहा है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Ida Nadi is complete and the Soma Nadi is not seen, then the person will die at the end of the year if the wise Shri Vemana has said so.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-developed Ida Nadi may be prone to spiritual crisis or early death.

approved.original: जिसके स्नानमात्रसे यदि हदय सूखजाता है या जिसके दर्शन में धूमा देख पड़ता है उसकी सातपर्वना के.बीचमें ही मोत होती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a person's Heart Line dries up just by taking a bath or if they see smoke in their vision, then their life will end in the middle of the seventh year.
approved.what_it_means: A person with this feature may experience a sudden and untimely death.

approved.original: स्वमे परयेत्तदा यस्तु स सद्यो प्रियते नरः
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the Mount of Venus is associated with a person's favorite things.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-developed Mount of Venus has a strong attachment to their favorite things and people.

approved.original: जो प्राणी स्वमे में ग्राञ्चत्तल की फुनगी या जड़ से कीचड़ के सागर में गिरे हुए भ्रपना को देखा है वह शीघरी मर जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person who sees a root or a tree in the Mount of Mars has fallen into a sea of mud has a quick death.
approved.what_it_means: A person with this feature may be prone to accidents or sudden death.

approved.original: जो प्राणी स्वमे में केश, ग्रंगार, चिताभस्म, सांप और निर्जन नदी को निहारता है तो उसकी दशा दिन या ग्यारह दिन में ही मोत होजाती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a person sees hair, a skull, ash, a snake, and a deserted river in their Mount of Jupiter, then their life will end in a day or eleven days.
approved.what_it_means: A person with this feature may experience a sudden and untimely death.

approved.original: सूर्योदये शिवा यस्य कोशन्याति च सम्पुष्म
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mount of Sun is prominent, it indicates a person with a strong willpower and determination. This feature reveals a person's ability to overcome obstacles and achieve their goals.
approved.what_it_means: A prominent Mount of Sun reveals a person's strong willpower and determination, enabling them to overcome obstacles and achieve their goals.

approved.original: विपरीतं पुरीपं वा सद्यो ग्रुत्युं स गच्छति
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mount of Jupiter is opposite or near the Mount of Saturn, it indicates a person who will soon face a downfall.
approved.what_it_means: An opposite or near Mount of Jupiter and Saturn reveals a person who may face a downfall or a significant setback in their life.

approved.original: सूर्योदय के समय सियार जिसके सामने फकरता हुआ चला जाता है एवं जिसके मल वहुत सा निकलता है तो वह प्राणी शीघ्र ही ग्रुत्यु को पाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a dog runs away from a person at sunrise and its stool is very large, it indicates that the person will soon meet their demise.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who may meet their demise soon, indicated by the dog's behavior and stool size.

approved.original: यस्य वै शुक्रमात्रन्तु हदयं वाध्यते क्षुधा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mount of Moon is only a small dot, it indicates that the person's heart is troubled by hunger.
approved.what_it_means: A small Mount of Moon reveals a person who may struggle with hunger or financial difficulties, affecting their well-being.

approved.original: प्रोजन करुक ने पर भी जिमका हदय भूख से व्याकुल बना रहता हो और दन्तहर्ष होते हों तो वह निस्सन्देह मरजाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mount of Jupiter is prominent and the person's heart is troubled by hunger, and they have a high forehead, it indicates that they will certainly die.
approved.what_it_means: A prominent Mount of Jupiter and a troubled heart reveal a person who may face a premature death due to their struggles.

approved.original: जो प्राणी श्राधरात्र के समय इंद्रघन्वा श्रौर दिन में चन्द्रग्रह को देखा है तो उस प्राणी का जीवन जल्द कीऐ होजाता है इसमें संशय नहीं है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a person sees a thunderbolt at night and the moon in the daytime, it indicates that their life will soon come to an end, with no doubt.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person whose life may come to an end soon, indicated by their experiences with thunder and the moon.

approved.original: नेत्रे बाष्पं सरेद्यस्य स गच्छेद्यमसादनम्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the eyes of a person are always watery, it indicates that they will soon meet their demise.
approved.what_it_means: Watery eyes reveal a person who may meet their demise soon, indicating a short lifespan.

approved.original: जिस प्राणी की नाक टेदी होजाने तथा कान व नेत्र देने होजावें श्रोर जिसके नेत्रों में कुच्चांपा निकलता होने तो वह प्राणी यमालय को जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a person's nose is crooked, their ears and eyes are prominent, and there is a lump in their eyes, it indicates that they will go to the abode of Yama.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who may meet their demise soon, indicated by their physical characteristics and the lump in their eyes.

approved.original: गरुडजी वोले कि ग्रहो भवन् ! चार मकाळाले माखिसमूहं में भारी कैसे उपजता है ? तथा खाल, रुढिर, मांस, पेदा, मजा, हाड और जीवन ये किस भाति उपजते हैं ? पादौ पाएी गुदं जिहा दन्ताः केशा नवानि च
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Oh Garuda, the celestial being, tells us that the four elements (earth, water, fire, and air) are born in a complex system. The lines on the hand represent the various aspects of life.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Mercury reveals the person's communication skills, adaptability, and ability to navigate complex situations.

approved.original: पांच, हाथ, गुदा, जिहा, दांत, केश, नख और श्रनेक सन्धिमार्ग तथा श्रनेक मकार की रेखायें किस भांति उपजती हैं ? कामः क्रोधो भयं लजा मनोहर्षः शुभाशुभम्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The lines on the hand, including the Mount of Jupiter, are formed in a specific way. These lines represent various aspects of life.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Jupiter reveals the person's leadership qualities, ambition, and sense of justice.

approved.original: विचित्रं चित्रितं चापि नाडीजालेन वेठितम्
approved.simple_explanation: The life line is a unique and intricate pattern formed by the network of lines on the hand.
approved.what_it_means: The Life Line reveals the person's vitality, resilience, and ability to navigate life's challenges.

approved.original: Alternatively, you can try contacting a professional in the field of palmistry or a language expert who may be able to assist you in extracting the text.
approved.simple_explanation: If you're having trouble extracting the text, you can try contacting a professional in palmistry or a language expert for assistance.
approved.what_it_means: The shape and lines of the palm reveal the person's overall character, strengths, and weaknesses.

approved.original: कासीदात शीदासीदासीदात नासीदासीदासीदात नासीदासीदासीदात
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: How is the Brahmarandha formed? What is its nature? It is formed from the elements and sustained by the elements, and it dissolves into the elements. Translation: The Brahmarandha is determined by the elements.
approved.what_it_means: The Brahmarandha reveals the person's elemental nature, their connection to the physical and spiritual worlds. It indicates their ability to adapt and change in response to their environment.

approved.original: िाका ारिकांताकारिका ारिका ाहाशासि ाहाशासि ाहाशासि
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The thumb is the creator of the universe and the destroyer of the universe. It is the embodiment of Lord Shiva, the creator and destroyer of the universe.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Jupiter, or the thumb, reveals the person's creative power, their ability to manifest their desires, and their connection to the divine.

approved.original: ाहाशासि ाहाशासि ाहाशासि पार्र् ाहाशासि
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The knowledge of the thumb is above all secrets, the knowledge of the thumb is above all wealth. This knowledge has not been given to anyone and has not been heard by anyone.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Jupiter, or the thumb, holds the key to understanding the universe and its secrets, which are beyond human comprehension.

approved.original: ाहाशासि ाहाशासि ाहाशासि पार्र् ाहाशासि
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The knowledge of the thumb is above all secrets, the knowledge of the thumb is above all wealth. This knowledge has not been given to anyone and has not been heard by anyone.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Jupiter, or the thumb, holds the key to understanding the universe and its secrets, which are beyond human comprehension.

approved.original: ाहाशासि ाहाशासि ाहाशासि पार्र् ाहाशासि
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The knowledge of the thumb is above all secrets, the knowledge of the thumb is above all wealth. This knowledge has not been given to anyone and has not been heard by anyone.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Jupiter, or the thumb, holds the key to understanding the universe and its secrets, which are beyond human comprehension.

approved.original: ाहाशासि ाहाशासि ाहाशासि पार्र् ाहाशासि
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The knowledge of the thumb is above all secrets, the knowledge of the thumb is above all wealth. This knowledge has not been given to anyone and has not been heard by anyone.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Jupiter, or the thumb, holds the key to understanding the universe and its secrets, which are beyond human comprehension.

approved.original: ाहाशासि ाहाशासि ाहाशासि िाहाशासि
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The knowledge of the thumb is above all secrets, the knowledge of the thumb is above all wealth. The knowledge of the thumb is above all wealth.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Jupiter, or the thumb, holds the key to understanding the universe and its secrets, which are beyond human comprehension.

approved.original: जो स्वरका बल होवे तो बैरी को मारदाले तथा मित्रों से पिलाप करे व स्वरवल के होने पर लक्ष्मी की प्राप्ति होती है और जन स्वरका बल होता है तभी कीर्ति और सुख मिलता है
approved.simple_explanation: The Mount of Venus indicates a person's love life and relationships. A strong Mount of Venus can bring wealth and happiness, but also attract enemies.
approved.what_it_means: A strong Mount of Venus reveals a person's capacity to attract wealth, love, and happiness, but also their potential to attract enemies and conflicts.

approved.original: कन्यामासिः स्वरवले स्वरतो राजदर्शनम्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A girl's hand with a Mount of Venus reveals royal vision.
approved.what_it_means: A strong Mount of Venus in a woman's hand indicates her potential to attract royal or high-status partners.

approved.original: स्वरवल के होने पर कन्या की प्राप्ति ( विवाह ) होती है, स्वसेही राजा का दर्शन होता है, स्वरसेही देवता की सिद्धि मिलती है और स्वरसेही राजा वश होजाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: With a Mount of Venus, a girl gets married, sees a king, achieves divine success, and controls the king.
approved.what_it_means: A strong Mount of Venus in a woman's hand indicates her potential for a successful marriage, royal connections, and spiritual growth.

approved.original: स्वरए गम्यते देशो भोज्यं स्वरवले तथा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: With a Mount of Venus, one travels to a foreign land and gets food.
approved.what_it_means: A strong Mount of Venus reveals a person's potential for travel, exploration, and access to new resources.

approved.original: स्वरकेही वलसे देशको जाता है व स्वरवलके होने पर भोजन मिलता है और स्वरवलके होने होते ही पेशात्र और मलका त्याग करे
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: With a Mount of Venus, one travels to a foreign land, gets food, and gives up bad habits.
approved.what_it_means: A strong Mount of Venus indicates a person's potential for travel, access to new resources, and the ability to overcome bad habits.

approved.original: सर्वशास्त्रपुरापादिसृतिवेदाङ्पूर्वकम्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: According to all scriptures, puranas, and Vedic texts.
approved.what_it_means: This text emphasizes the importance of palm reading as a universal and authoritative knowledge.

approved.original: स्वरज्ञानात्परं तत्वं नास्ति किश्चिद्रानने
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: There is no truth beyond palm reading knowledge.
approved.what_it_means: This text highlights the significance of palm reading as a comprehensive and ultimate knowledge.

approved.original: अहो वरानने ! समस्त शास्त्र, पुराण आदि, स्रुति और वेदाङ्पूर्वक स्वरज्ञान से परे कुछ तत्व नहीं है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Oh beautiful face! There is no truth beyond palm reading knowledge, according to all scriptures, puranas, and Vedic texts.
approved.what_it_means: This text emphasizes the importance of palm reading as a universal and authoritative knowledge that surpasses all other scriptures and texts.

approved.original: नामरूपादिकः सर्वो मिथ्या संवपु विश्रमः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Everything is an illusion, including one's name and form. This teaches that nothing is permanent or real.
approved.what_it_means: This line reveals the person's tendency to be detached from material possessions and relationships, seeing them as fleeting and illusory.

approved.original: सर्वग्यापी धनजय पवन सूतक शरीर को भी नहीं त्यागता है ये दश पवन जीवरूपी  प्रकर सारी नाडियों में भ्रमते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Pavan Line, a sign of good fortune, does not abandon the body and confuses all the nerves with its ten forms.
approved.what_it_means: The presence of the Pavan Line indicates a person's good fortune and ability to navigate life's challenges with ease and clarity.

approved.original: देहके बीचमें जो मकट पायोंका संचार होताहै उसको इडा, पिङला और सुपुन्ना इन  नाडियों से ही पैदित को लखना चाहिये
approved.simple_explanation: The communication between the two feet is generated by the Ida, Pingala, and Sushumna nerves, which should be understood.
approved.what_it_means: The Ida and Pingala nerves reveal a person's emotional and mental balance, influencing their relationships and decision-making abilities.

approved.original: इडा वामे च विज्ञेया पिङ्ला दक्षिए स्मृता
approved.simple_explanation: The Ida Nadi is located on the left and should be known, while Pingala is on the right and remembered.
approved.what_it_means: The Ida Nadi's presence indicates a person's emotional sensitivity and ability to connect with others on a deep level.

approved.original: इडानाडी स्थिता वामा ततो व्यस्ता च पिङ्ला
approved.simple_explanation: The Ida Nadi is located on the left and is busy, while Pingala is on the right and active.
approved.what_it_means: The Pingala Nadi's presence indicates a person's energetic and adventurous nature, often leading them to take risks and pursue new opportunities.

approved.original: वामभागमें इडा जानना चाहिये और दक्षिणभागमें पिङ्ला कहलाती है, इडा नाडी  मारूप से स्थित है और पिङ्ला व्यस्त से रहती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: One should know the Ida in the left part and Pingala in the right part, the Ida Nadi is situated in the moon shape and Pingala is active.
approved.what_it_means: The Ida Nadi's presence in the left hand indicates a person's emotional and intuitive nature, while the Pingala Nadi's presence in the right hand reveals their energetic and adventurous side.

approved.original: इडायां तु स्थितश्रन्द्रः पिङ्लायां च भास्करः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Ida is in the moon shape and Pingala is in the sun shape.
approved.what_it_means: The Ida and Pingala nerves reveal a person's emotional and mental balance, influencing their relationships and decision-making abilities.

approved.original: इडानाडी में चन्द्रपा स्थित है व पिङ्ला नाडी में सूर्य टिकाहै और सुपुन्ना शम्भुरूप  रहती है और राम्भु हंसरूपसे स्थित है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Ida Nadi has the moon in it and the Pingala Nadi has the sun in it, and Sushumna is in the shape of Shiva and Ram is in the shape of Hamsa.
approved.what_it_means: The Ida Nadi's presence indicates a person's emotional and intuitive nature, while the Pingala Nadi's presence reveals their energetic and adventurous side.

approved.original: श्वास के निकलने में हकार कहा है और सकार से श्वासका प्रवेश होता है और  पकार शिवशूप से रहता है व सकार शक्तिरूप कहाती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Sakar Line represents the inspiration line, where the breath enters the body. It is associated with power and stability.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Sakar Line indicates a person with strong willpower and determination, who can overcome challenges with ease.

approved.original: शक्तिरूपः स्थितश्रन्द्रो वामनाडीप्रवाहकः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Shaktirupa is the one who is the abode of the seated lord and the one who carries the Vamana Nadi.
approved.what_it_means: A strong Shaktirupa Line suggests a person with immense inner strength and the ability to overcome obstacles with ease.

approved.original: वापनाडीका चलनेवाला चन्द्रपा शक्तिरूप से स्थित है और दक्षिण नाडीका वधाने  वाला सूर्य शम्भुरूप से टिकारहता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Vapana Nadi is the one that is moving and is situated in the Chandra Pa Shaktirupa, and the South Nadi is the one that is piercing and is situated in the Surya Shambhu.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Chandra Line indicates a person with emotional balance and stability, while a strong Surya Line suggests a person with leadership qualities and a strong will.

approved.original: श्वासे सकारसंस्थे तु यह्हानं दीयते बुधैः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In the Sakar, the one who is given by the wise is this.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Sakar Line indicates a person with strong intuition and the ability to make wise decisions.

approved.original: जव श्वास सकार में टिकता है तब पैदितों करके जो दान दियाजाता है वह दान  रस जीवलोक में करोड़ का करोड़गुणा फलदायक होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the breath stays in the Sakar, then the donation made by the creation is a donation of the essence, which is a thousand times more fruitful in the world.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Sakar Line indicates a person with the ability to make selfless donations and bring about positive change in the world.

approved.original: सर्वमेव विजानीयान्मार्गे व चन्द्रसूर्ययोः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: All are to be known in the path of the Chandra and Surya.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Chandra Line indicates a person with emotional balance and stability, while a strong Surya Line suggests a person with leadership qualities and a strong will.

approved.original: सावधान व एकाग्रचित्त होता हुआ योगी इसी मार्ग से देखे और चन्द्रमा व सूर्यकी मार्गमें ही सबको जानलेंगे
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The vigilant and one-pointed yogi sees all in this path and knows all in the path of the Chandra and Surya.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Chandra Line indicates a person with emotional balance and stability, while a strong Surya Line suggests a person with leadership qualities and a strong will.

approved.original: ध्यायेत्तर्वं स्थिरे जीवे अस्थिरे न कदाचन
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: One should meditate on the unshakeable and living, never on the unsteady.
approved.what_it_means: Regular meditation practice helps to cultivate a stable and calm mind, leading to inner peace and clarity.

approved.original: जव जीव स्थिर होनावे तो मनुष्य तत्वका ध्यान करे ओंक जव स्थिर न होवे तो कदापि ध्यान न करे उसके इष्कि सिद्धि होती है और महालाभ तथा जय होताहै
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mount of Jupiter is stable, the person should focus on spiritual growth. If it's unstable, they should never focus on it, as it can lead to ego and loss.
approved.what_it_means: A stable Mount of Jupiter indicates a strong sense of purpose and spiritual growth, while an unstable one can lead to ego and self-destruction.

approved.original: चन्द्रसूर्ययत्तमभ्यासं ये कुर्वन्ति सदा नराः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Those who practice the combination of the Sun and Moon are always good people.
approved.what_it_means: The combination of the Sun and Moon lines indicates a balanced and harmonious personality, often associated with good character and behavior.

approved.original: जो मनुष्य सदैव चन्द्र व सर्यके स्वरोंका मेलेभाँति भ्रूभ्यास करते हैं उनको भूतभविष्य का ज्ञान प्रत्यक्ष भासने लगता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Those who always practice the combination of the Moon and Sun sounds in their eyebrows get direct knowledge of past and future.
approved.what_it_means: The combination of the Moon and Sun lines in the eyebrows indicates a strong intuition and ability to perceive past and future events.

approved.original: वामभाग में इटानाडी ग्रुतस्त्रु होकर जगत् को परम पोषक करती है और दक्षिणभाग में चरभाग से पित्तलानाडी सदैव जगत् को उपनाती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The left side of the Heart Line is nourishing the world, and the right side of the Head Line is always giving heat to the world.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Heart Line on the left side indicates a person who nourishes and cares for others, while a developed Head Line on the right side indicates a person who is passionate and energetic.

approved.original: मध्यमा ( सुपुत्रा ) नाडी कटोर होकर सबकार्यों में निद्धित कहलाती है और वामा नाडी सब शुभकार्यों में सिद्धिदायक होती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Middle Line is said to be focused on all activities, and the left Line is said to be auspicious for all good deeds.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Middle Line indicates a person who is focused and determined, while a developed left Line indicates a person who is auspicious and successful in their endeavors.

approved.original: निर्गमे तु शुभा वामा प्रवेरे दक्षिणा शुभा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In exit, the left Line is auspicious, and in entry, the right Line is auspicious.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Mount of Venus on the left side indicates a person who is auspicious and successful in their relationships, while a developed Mount of Venus on the right side indicates a person who is passionate and energetic in their relationships.

approved.original: चन्द्र: समस्तु विज्ञेयो रविस्तु विषमः सदा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Moon is always known, and the Sun is always different.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Sun Line indicates a person who is unique and different, while a developed Moon Line indicates a person who is intuitive and perceptive.

approved.original: गमन के समय वामा नाडी और प्रवेश के समय दक्षिण ( पिकिला ) नाडी शुभदायक कहाती है और चन्द्रमा को सम व सूर्यको विषम जानना चाहिये
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The left Line is auspicious at the time of departure, and the right Line is auspicious at the time of entry, and it is necessary to know that the Moon is harmonious and the Sun is different.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Mount of Venus on the left side indicates a person who is auspicious and successful in their relationships, while a developed Mount of Venus on the right side indicates a person who is passionate and energetic in their relationships.

approved.original: चन्द्र: श्री पुरुष: मूर्यस्चन्द्रो गौरोसितो रवि:
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Moon: The Moon is a symbol of the person's inner self, emotions, and intuition. It represents the subconscious mind.
approved.what_it_means: The Moon reveals the person's emotional depth, intuition, and inner world. A well-developed Moon indicates emotional balance and a strong connection to one's inner self.

approved.original: चन्द्रनाडीप्रवाहे सोम्यकार्योऽपि कारयेत्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: When the Moon's flow is in the Somya (lunar) phase, one should also perform Somya work.
approved.what_it_means: When the Moon is in its Somya phase, the person is more receptive and intuitive, making it an ideal time for introspection and emotional healing.

approved.original: चन्द्रमा बीसंजक ओंक गुरू पुष्पसंक कहानाता है, चन्द्रमा गौरवं मूर्यं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Moon is a symbol of the person's inner self, emotions, and intuition. It represents the subconscious mind.
approved.what_it_means: The Moon reveals the person's emotional depth, intuition, and inner world. A well-developed Moon indicates emotional balance and a strong connection to one's inner self.

approved.original: यामवर्ग कहलाते हैं और जव चन्द्रमाकी नाडी का प्रवाह होता हो उस समय सौम्य त्रायों को करावे
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: These are called Yamavarga and when the Moon's flow is in this phase, one should perform Somya (lunar) work.
approved.what_it_means: During the Yamavarga phase, the person is more receptive and intuitive, making it an ideal time for introspection and emotional healing.

approved.original: जव सूर्यकी नाडीका प्रवाह होता हो उस समय रौद्रपां (उप्रकारों) को करे और सुपुत्रा नाडीका स्वर वहता हो तो शुक्रि-मुक्तिदायक कमां को करना चाहिये
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: When the Sun's flow is in this phase, one should perform Raudra (solar) work, and when the flow of the Suputra (planetary) Nadi is in this phase, one should perform Shukra (Venus)-liberating work.
approved.what_it_means: During the Sun's phase, the person is more energetic and action-oriented, making it an ideal time for taking bold action and pursuing goals.

approved.original: श्रादौ चन्द्र: सिते पत्रे भास्करो हि सितेतर
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In the Shradha (ritual) of the Moon, the Moon is in the phase of the letter 'Si' and the Sun is in the phase of the letter 'Ta'.
approved.what_it_means: During the Moon's Shradha, the person is more receptive and intuitive, making it an ideal time for introspection and emotional healing.

approved.original: प्रतिपत्तो दिनान्याहुद्धीपि त्रीपि कृतोदयौ
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Moon is in the phase of the letter 'Ta' and the Sun is in the phase of the letter 'Tri' even on the day of the full moon.
approved.what_it_means: Even on the day of the full moon, the person's emotional depth and intuition remain strong, making it an ideal time for emotional healing and introspection.

approved.original: शक्रपक्ष में पहले चन्द्रमा का स्वर और कृष्णपक्ष में पहले सूर्यका स्वर चलता है और परेवासे लेकर तीन दिन चन्द्रमा व सूर्यका स्वर वलवान होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In the Shukla (lunar) phase, the Moon's flow comes first, and in the Krishna (lunar) phase, the Sun's flow comes first, and for three days, the flow of the Moon and the Sun becomes mixed.
approved.what_it_means: During the Shukla and Krishna phases, the person's emotional depth and intuition remain strong, making it an ideal time for emotional healing and introspection.

approved.original: सार्धद्वित्रिके ज्ञेय: शुक्रे कृष्णे राशीरवि:
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In the middle of the second and third fingers, the Shukra Line is seen, which is dark and in the Rashi line.
approved.what_it_means: The Shukra Line reveals the person's sensual nature and their ability to enjoy life's pleasures. A well-developed Shukra Line indicates a person who values relationships and intimacy.

approved.original: वहेत्युतचटीमध्ये पत्र तत्वानि निर्दिशेत्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Heart Line is indicated in the middle of the fingers.
approved.what_it_means: The Heart Line reveals a person's emotional nature and their capacity for love. A well-developed Heart Line indicates a person who is empathetic and caring.

approved.original: प्रतिपत्तो दिनान्याहुद्धीपरिते विवर्जयेत्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Head Line is to be avoided on the day of the new moon.
approved.what_it_means: The Head Line reveals a person's thought patterns and their ability to focus. A well-developed Head Line indicates a person who is intelligent and analytical.

approved.original: शुक्रपक्ष में परेवा से लेकर पहले वामा नाडी और कृष्णपक्ष में दक्षिणा नाडी को एकाग्रमनवाला योगी जाने
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In the Shukra Paksha, from the Parva to the first left line, and in the Krishna Paksha, the Dakshina line is to be known as the Ekagrata Yoga.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Venus reveals a person's sensual and emotional nature. A well-developed Mount of Venus indicates a person who is passionate and affectionate.

approved.original: रात्रिक समय चन्द्रस्वर को और दिनमें सूर्यस्वरको बजिदेे इस भांति सदैव भ्राम्यास लगा हुआ वह निस्सन्देह योगी कहलाता है

approved.original: दुर्भिक्ष राष्ट्रेभक: स्यादुतपत्तिश्र विनरयति
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A well-developed Drought Line indicates a country that will suffer from famine.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Drought Line reveals a person who will experience difficulties and challenges in their life.

approved.original: यदि मेपसंक्रान्ति के दिवस अनितस्व बहता हो तो अकाल पड़ता है, देशका भक होजाता है, उपन की सय होती है और वर्ष बहुत ही कम होती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Drought Line is flowing on the day of the Sun's transition, then there will be drought, the country will suffer, the crops will wither, and the year will be very short.
approved.what_it_means: A flowing Drought Line on the day of the Sun's transition reveals a person who will experience drought, suffering, and a short life.

approved.original: उत्पातोपद्रवा भीतिरल्पा वृद्धि: स्युरीतयः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A well-developed Famine Line indicates a country that will suffer from famine and poverty.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Famine Line reveals a person who will experience poverty, suffering, and a difficult life.

approved.original: यदि भेष की संक्रान्ति के समय वायुतस्त्व वहता हो तो उत्पात, उपद्रव, भीति, भोडी सी वृद्धि और इतियां होती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the air element is flowing at the time of the person's birth, then chaos, trouble, fear, and a sudden increase in expenses and income will occur.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person prone to sudden changes and financial ups and downs, requiring adaptability and caution.

approved.original: तत्रापि शून्यता ज्ञेया सस्यादीनां मुखस्य च
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Despite this, emptiness is to be known as the face of crops, etc.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's material wealth and prosperity may be uncertain or lacking.

approved.original: यदि मेपकी संक्रान्ति के समय आकाशतस्व वहता हो तो धान्य त्रादि और मुखकी शून्यता जाना चाहिये
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the mercury element is flowing at the time of the person's birth, then grains, etc., and the emptiness of the face should be known.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's communication skills and mental agility, which can be a key to their success.

approved.original: पूर्णप्रवेशने रवासे सस्यं तत्वेन सिद्धयति
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Through complete entry, the crop becomes true through the sun.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's relationships and love life are likely to be fulfilling and successful.

approved.original: सूर्यचन्द्र-न्यथाभूते संग्रहः सर्वसिद्धिद:
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In the case of sun-chandra opposition, collection is the source of all success.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's ability to collect and accumulate resources, leading to their overall success and prosperity.

approved.original: यदि श्वासका पूर्णपवेश होनावे तो तत्व से धान्य की सिद्धि होती है और यदि तत्वो-दर के समय सूर्य व चन्द्रसर विपरीत होवें यानी चन्द्र के योगमें सूर्यस्वर व सूर्य के योग में चन्द्रस्वर बहता हो तो अन्न का संग्रह सर्वसिद्धिदायक होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the breath is fully inhaled, then the truth leads to the realization of grains, and if at the time of truth, the sun and moon are in opposition, i.e., the moon's conjunction with the sun's sound and the sun's conjunction with the moon's sound, then the collection of food is the source of all success.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's life force and vitality are strong, leading to their overall well-being and success.

approved.original: तत्कुर्याद्रस्तुसंग्रहो द्विमासे च महघेता
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: At that time, the collection of Mars is great in two months.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's energy and drive are focused, leading to significant accomplishments and progress within a short period.

approved.original: यदि दक्षिणस्वर में ग्रनितरन या केवल आकारातत्व ही जाना जाता हो तो बस्त्रां का संग्रह करे क्योंकि दो महीने में वहैगी पडेगी उससे बड़ा लाभ होगा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If in the southern direction, the granites are running or only the shape is known, then collect cloth, because in two months, it will be cheap, and there will be a greater benefit.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's emotional and intuitive nature is strong, leading to their ability to make wise and beneficial decisions.

approved.original: यदि रात्रि के समय सूर्य की नाडी वहती हो और प्रभात के समय चन्द्र की नाडी चलती हो और उसी समय श्राकारा, वायु और अग्नितत्व का योग हो तो पृथ्वीतल में वहा ग्रनर्थ होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Sun Line is active at night and the Moon Line is active at dawn, and there is a combination of the Sun, Air, and Fire elements at the same time, then prosperity occurs on the earth.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who will achieve great success and prosperity in their life.

approved.original: यदि रोगमन के समय पृथ्वीतस्व वहता हो तो अपने पापसे रोग होता है और यदि जलतच्च चलता हो तो जलपात्काश्यों के दोष से वाधा होती है और यदि श्रिनितच्च वहता हो तो खेटवाटी में टिकी शकिनी या पितरों के दोष से पीड़ा उपजती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Earth Line is active during illness, then the person suffers from past karma. If the Water Line is active, then they are affected by the defects of water-related problems. If the Fire Line is active, then they suffer from the defects of the goddess or ancestors.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests a person who is suffering from past karma, and their current health issues are a result of their past actions.

approved.original: श्रादौ शून्यगतो दूतः पथ्रात्यूर्ये विशोददि
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Dutagati Line is active during the time of death, and it reveals the path to the afterlife.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who is on the path to spiritual liberation and will achieve a peaceful death.

approved.original: मृच्छितोऽपि ध्रुवं जीवेद्यदर्थ प्रतिपृच्छति
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Even if the person is in a state of unconsciousness, they will still live and respond to their desires.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests a person who is strong-willed and determined to achieve their goals, even in the face of adversity.

approved.original: यदि वसन कनेवाला दूत पहले गन्य श्रंकी तरफ आया हो व पीड़े से पृगाद्ध की तरफ बैठजावे तो जिस रोगी के लिये पीड़ा है वह मूर्च्छित भी होगया हो तो भी निश्चय से जीता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Vasana Line is active and the person is suffering from pain, then the person who is suffering from the disease is also in a state of unconsciousness, but they will still be saved.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who is strong and will overcome their current health issues.

approved.original: यस्मिन्नै स्थितो जीवस्तत्रस्थः परिपृच्छ्यति
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Jiva Line is active in the place where the person is situated, and it reveals the path to the afterlife.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests a person who is on the path to spiritual liberation and will achieve a peaceful death.

approved.original: जिस श्रंक में माणवायु टिका हो उसी तरफ वैदा हुआ दूत जिस रोगी को पृगाद्ध है वह यदि रोगों से विर भी गया हो तो भी जीता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In the place where the Vayu Line is active, the person who is suffering from the disease will still be saved, even if they have overcome their illnesses.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who is strong and will overcome their current health issues.

approved.original: यदि दाहिने स्वर से वायु वहता हो उसी समय आया हुआ दूत पुख से भयानक वचनों को बोले तो वह जीव जीता है और यदि चन्द्रसर चलता हो तो समान फल होताहै
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Vayu Line is active from the right side, then the person who has come will speak terrible words, and the person will still be saved. If the Moon Line is active, then the result will be the same.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests a person who will overcome their current challenges and achieve a positive outcome.

approved.simple_explanation: Samudrika Shastra is an ancient Indian science of body reading. It is a simple and comprehensive system.
